<script>
(function() {
  // Adjust this regex to match ONLY the changelog pages you want blocked
  var changelogRegex = /\/changelog$/i;

  if (changelogRegex.test(window.location.pathname)) {
    var meta = document.createElement('meta');
    meta.name = "robots";
    meta.content = "noindex, follow"; // or "noindex, nofollow" if you prefer
    document.head.appendChild(meta);
  }
})();
</script>


<script>
;(function(){
  // only activate on pages with "release-notes" in the URL
  if (!window.location.href.includes('release-notes')) return;

  let pause = false;
  const observer = new MutationObserver(records => {
    for (const rec of records) {
      for (const node of rec.addedNodes) {
        if (
          node.tagName === 'SCRIPT' &&
          !node.hasAttribute('src') &&
          node.id !== 'hub-me'
        ) {
          // Start pausing when we hit <script id="customJS">, and keep pausing thereafter
          if (node.id === 'customJS' || pause) {
            pause = true;
            node.setAttribute('type', 'text/plain');
          }
        }
      }
    }
  });

  // Begin observing all new nodes
  observer.observe(document.documentElement, {
    childList: true,
    subtree: true
  });

  // When the page is fully loaded (hydration done), restore & execute
  window.addEventListener('load', () => {
    observer.disconnect();
    const held = document.querySelectorAll('script[type="text/plain"]');
    for (const oldScript of held) {
      const s = document.createElement('script');
      // copy all attrs except type
      for (const {name, value} of oldScript.attributes) {
        if (name !== 'type') s.setAttribute(name, value);
      }
      s.text = oldScript.textContent;
      oldScript.parentNode.replaceChild(s, oldScript);
    }
  });
})();
</script>

/***************************************************************
 * 2) Build the "Product" view (one collapsible per product),
 *    with sub-headings for each integration.
 ***************************************************************/
function buildProductView(rows) {
  const exploded = [];
  rows.forEach((r) => {
    const products = r.btProds.split(";").map((s) => s.trim()).filter(Boolean);
    const integrations = r.extInts.split(";").map((s) => s.trim()).filter(Boolean);
    if (!integrations.length) integrations.push("BeyondTrust"); // if extInts is empty

    products.forEach((p) => {
      integrations.forEach((i) => {
        exploded.push({
          product: p,
          integration: i,
          linkText: `${r.TitleForProd}`,
          url: r.html,
        });
      });
    });
  });

  const productMap = {};
  exploded.forEach((item) => {
    if (!productMap[item.product]) {
      productMap[item.product] = {};
    }
    if (!productMap[item.product][item.integration]) {
      productMap[item.product][item.integration] = [];
    }
    productMap[item.product][item.integration].push({
      text: item.linkText,
      url: item.url,
    });
  });

  const finalArray = [];
  Object.keys(productMap)
    .sort((a, b) => a.localeCompare(b, undefined, { sensitivity: 'base' }))
    .forEach((prodName) => {
      const subObj = productMap[prodName];
      const subGroups = [];
      Object.keys(subObj)
        .sort((a, b) => a.localeCompare(b, undefined, { sensitivity: 'base' }))
        .forEach((intName) => {
          subGroups.push({
            subTitle: intName,
            links: subObj[intName],
          });
        });
      finalArray.push({
        title: prodName,
        subGroups,
      });
    });
  return finalArray;
}

/***************************************************************
 * 3) Build the "Integration" view (one collapsible per vendor),
 *    with sub-headings for each product.
 ***************************************************************/
function buildIntegrationView(rows) {
  const exploded = [];
  rows.forEach((r) => {
    const products = r.btProds.split(";").map((s) => s.trim()).filter(Boolean);
    const integrations = r.extInts.split(";").map((s) => s.trim()).filter(Boolean);
    // if (!products.length) products.push("Other");
    // if (!integrations.length) integrations.push("Other");

    integrations.forEach((i) => {
      products.forEach((p) => {
        exploded.push({
          integration: i,
          product: p,
          linkText: `${r.TitleForInt}`,
          url: r.html,
        });
      });
    });
  });

  const integrationMap = {};
  exploded.forEach((item) => {
    if (!integrationMap[item.integration]) {
      integrationMap[item.integration] = {};
    }
    if (!integrationMap[item.integration][item.product]) {
      integrationMap[item.integration][item.product] = [];
    }
    integrationMap[item.integration][item.product].push({
      text: item.linkText,
      url: item.url,
    });
  });

  const finalArray = [];
  Object.keys(integrationMap)
    .sort((a, b) => a.localeCompare(b, undefined, { sensitivity: 'base' }))
    .forEach((intName) => {
      const subObj = integrationMap[intName];
      const subGroups = [];
      Object.keys(subObj)
        .sort((a, b) => a.localeCompare(b, undefined, { sensitivity: 'base' }))
        .forEach((prodName) => {
          subGroups.push({
            subTitle: prodName,
            links: subObj[prodName],
          });
        });
      finalArray.push({
        title: intName,
        subGroups,
      });
    });
  return finalArray;
}

/***************************************************************
 * 4) Actually build the arrays for both views
 ***************************************************************/
const productViewData = buildProductView(masterRows);
const integrationViewData = buildIntegrationView(masterRows);

const linksData = {
  Product: productViewData,
  Integration: integrationViewData,
};

/***************************************************************
 * HELPER: createProductIcon(productName) 
 *         => unique image URLs per product 
 ***************************************************************/
function createProductIcon(productName) {
  // We now point EVERY product to the same icon URL:
  const iconMap = {
  "AD Bridge": "https://files.readme.io/9255f2e197d7265561ad4c717b7aeffc50add5fc185984902033bb58817b0409-AD-Bridge1.svg",
  "Password Safe": "https://files.readme.io/ccc53a2597971a3ee4980985ad6b6f1ff0e98160df9e3bc57b77ed4c24d60c11-BeyondInsight-Password-Safe1.svg",
  "BeyondInsight for Unix and Linux": "https://files.readme.io/ccc53a2597971a3ee4980985ad6b6f1ff0e98160df9e3bc57b77ed4c24d60c11-BeyondInsight-Password-Safe1.svg",
  "Endpoint Privilege Management for Linux Cloud": "https://files.readme.io/1563cef8d1a5c62d69aa388315b79f6f05c6aaf93688aed92c14113027a9e2c9-Endpoint-Privilege-Management-Unix-Linux1.svg",
  "Endpoint Privilege Management for Unix and Linux": "https://files.readme.io/1563cef8d1a5c62d69aa388315b79f6f05c6aaf93688aed92c14113027a9e2c9-Endpoint-Privilege-Management-Unix-Linux1.svg",
  "Endpoint Privilege Management for Windows and Mac": "https://files.readme.io/fb95b93cb021aeca6de399782ef6ea66e77b77edd50dc2a710b186ea28c99569-Endpoint_Privilege_Management_for_Windows_and_Mac1.svg",
  "Entitle": "https://files.readme.io/f13da16df2349d0322be0145bfecbc3194b0d0d7dd2bed21fc7942094866d27c-Entitle1.svg",
  "Identity Security Insights": "https://files.readme.io/dd0d350e4f32f283f2e195466cd9240b8078143aba0a807f71b16b446344e7cf-Identity-Security-Insights1.svg",
  "Privileged Remote Access": "https://files.readme.io/57a46b110a43bf7451cd30b4aaefdfaf577ec507e2af430803773571e1ac6c56-Privileged-Remote-Access1.svg",
  "Remote Support": "https://files.readme.io/6aec6d7fe896768d5eae2ddea2860e01035b2e5fe4766546715073c7bd85c293-Remote-Support1.svg",
  "U-Series Appliance": "https://files.readme.io/ccc53a2597971a3ee4980985ad6b6f1ff0e98160df9e3bc57b77ed4c24d60c11-BeyondInsight-Password-Safe1.svg",
  };

  // If productName isn't in the map, use the same fallback icon
  const iconURL =
    iconMap[productName] ||
    "https://files.readme.io/f3216e68f9ef514510c30923c389571662377c1983b5bd2dd202a79696c7f385-prod0.svg";

  const img = document.createElement("img");
  img.src = iconURL;
  img.alt = productName + " icon";
  img.width = 40;
  img.height = 40;
  // margin on the right so there's space between icon and text
  img.style.marginRight = "10px";

  return img;
}

/***************************************************************
 * 5) Render the collapsibles
 *    For each item => one collapsible => inside are sub-headings
 ***************************************************************/
function populateCategories() {
  const categoryList = document.getElementById("categoryList");

  Object.keys(linksData).forEach((categoryType) => {
    // categoryType = "Product" or "Integration"
    linksData[categoryType]
    .sort((a, b) => a.title.toLowerCase().localeCompare(b.title.toLowerCase())) // Case-insensitive sorting
    .forEach((groupObj) => {
      // groupObj = { title: "...", subGroups: [...] }

      // Outer div (one collapsible per groupObj)
      const categoryDiv = document.createElement("div");
      categoryDiv.classList.add("category");
      categoryDiv.setAttribute("data-category", categoryType);
      categoryDiv.style.display = "none"; // hidden by default

      // Collapsible header
      const header = document.createElement("div");
      header.classList.add("category-header");
      header.onclick = () => toggleCategory(header);

      const h3 = document.createElement("h3");

      // If it's the Product category, add the product icon first.
      if (categoryType === "Product") {
        const productIcon = createProductIcon(groupObj.title);
        h3.appendChild(productIcon);
      }

      // Then append the actual product / integration title
      h3.appendChild(document.createTextNode(groupObj.title));
	  
	  // Create a UID for each header
	  const anchorId = groupObj.title.toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, "-");
	  h3.id = anchorId;

      const arrow = document.createElement("span");
      arrow.classList.add("arrow", "fa-solid", "fa-caret-down"); // initial down arrow

      header.appendChild(h3);
      header.appendChild(arrow);
      categoryDiv.appendChild(header);

      // Collapsible content
      const linkList = document.createElement("div");
      linkList.classList.add("link-list");
      linkList.style.display = "none"; // collapsed by default

      const subHeadingsContainer = document.createElement("div");
      subHeadingsContainer.classList.add("sub-headings-container");

      groupObj.subGroups.forEach((subG) => {
        // Create a container for the subheading and links
        const subHeadingContainer = document.createElement("div");
        subHeadingContainer.classList.add("sub-heading-container");

        const subHeading = document.createElement("div");
        subHeading.classList.add("sub-heading");
        subHeading.textContent = subG.subTitle;

        const ul = document.createElement("ul");
        subG.links.sort((a, b) => a.text.localeCompare(b.text)).forEach((lnk) => {
          const li = document.createElement("li");
          const a = document.createElement("a");
          a.href = lnk.url;
          a.textContent = lnk.text;
          li.appendChild(a);
          ul.appendChild(li);
        });

        // Append the subheading and its links
        subHeadingContainer.appendChild(subHeading);
        subHeadingContainer.appendChild(ul);

        // Append to the sub-headings container
        subHeadingsContainer.appendChild(subHeadingContainer);
      });

      linkList.appendChild(subHeadingsContainer);
      categoryDiv.appendChild(linkList);
      categoryList.appendChild(categoryDiv);
    });
  });
}

/***************************************************************
 * 6) Filter function: show either "Product" or "Integration"
 ***************************************************************/
window.filterByCategory = function (category) {
  toggleActiveButton(category); // Toggle the active button

  const categories = document.querySelectorAll(".category");
  categories.forEach((cat) => {
    cat.style.display = cat.dataset.category === category ? "block" : "none";
  });
};

/***************************************************************
 * 7) Toggle active state on buttons
 ***************************************************************/
function toggleActiveButton(category) {
  const productButton = document.querySelector('.filter-button[data-category="Product"]');
  const integrationButton = document.querySelector('.filter-button[data-category="Integration"]');

  if (category === "Product") {
    productButton.classList.add("active");
    integrationButton.classList.remove("active");
  } else if (category === "Integration") {
    integrationButton.classList.add("active");
    productButton.classList.remove("active");
  }
}

/***************************************************************
 * 8) Toggle collapsible sections
 ***************************************************************/
 window.toggleCategory = function(headerElement) {
    const categoryDiv = headerElement.parentElement; // e.g. the ".category" container
    const linkList = headerElement.nextElementSibling;
    const arrow = headerElement.querySelector(".arrow");
  
    if (!linkList || !arrow) return;
  
    const isCollapsed = (linkList.style.display === "none" || linkList.style.display === "");
    linkList.style.display = isCollapsed ? "block" : "none";
  
    // Add or remove the "open" class
    if (isCollapsed) {
      categoryDiv.classList.add("open");
      arrow.classList.remove("fa-caret-down");
      arrow.classList.add("fa-caret-up");
    } else {
      categoryDiv.classList.remove("open");
      arrow.classList.remove("fa-caret-up");
      arrow.classList.add("fa-caret-down");
    }
  };
  

/***************************************************************
 * 9 - MOVED TO JS
 ***************************************************************/

</script><script>var storedColorMode = window.localStorage.getItem('color-scheme')
if (storedColorMode) {
  document.querySelector('[data-color-mode]').setAttribute('data-color-mode', storedColorMode)
}
</script></head><body id="enterprise" glp-state-container><div id="ssr-top"><script src="https://cdn.readme.io/public/js/cash-dom.min.js?1773344051393"></script></div><div id="ssr-main"><div <style>
    /* Import Lato */
    @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Lato:wght@400;700&display=swap');

    /* Import Roboto */
    @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Roboto:wght@400;700&display=swap');

  
@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
  [data-color-mode="system"] section {
    background-color: #242E34;
  }
}

[data-color-mode="dark"] section {
  background-color: #242E34;
  }

  #NavCatPrintBtn {display:none !important;}


  
    body {
        --white: #ffffff;
        --white-07: #ffffffb7;
        --black: #000000;
        --dark: #10395E;
        --blue: #073376;
        --blue-07: #bccadf;
        --neutral-blue: #1a3866;
        --blue-hover: #cacdf5;
        --orange: #ff5500;
        --grey: #e8eaea;
        --dark-grey: #231f20;
        --Roboto: "Roboto", sans-serif;
        --Lato: "Lato", sans-serif;
    }

    body {
        min-height: 100vh;
        font-size: 14px;
        line-height: 1.5;
        color: var(--black);
    }
    
    .body-font {
        font-family: var(--Roboto);
        font-size: 16px;
    }

    h1 {
        font-family: var(--Lato);
        font-size: 40px;
        font-weight: 800;
        line-height: 54px;
    }

    h2 {
        font-family: var(--Lato);
        font-size: 30px;
        font-weight: 800;
        line-height: 44px;
    }

    h3 {
        font-family: var(--Lato);
        font-size: 18px;
        font-weight: 800;
        line-height: 28px;
    }

    h4 {
        font-family: var(--Roboto);
        font-size: 15px;
        font-weight: 400;
        line-height: 24px;
    }

    h5 {
        font-family: var(--Roboto);
        font-size: 14px;
        font-family: var(--Roboto);
    }

    h6 {
        font-family: var(--Roboto);
        font-size: 16px;
        font-weight: 400;
        line-height: 20px;
    }

    a {
        font-size: 20px;
        font-weight: 700;
        text-decoration: none;
  
    }

    a:hover>svg {
        fill: var(--blue-hover);
    }

    .text-link:hover {
        text-decoration: none;
        color: var(--black);
    }

    .text-link.text-opposite:hover {
        color: var(--white);
    }

    button {
        font-size: 16px;
        line-height: 20px;
        font-weight: 700;
    }

    section {
        position: relative;
        overflow: hidden;
    }

    /* Search */
    .rm-Header-search {
        position: absolute !important;
        top: 270px;
        left: 50%;
        transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
        margin: 0;
        /* Ensure there's no unexpected margin */
        max-width: 800px;
        max-width: 90%;
    }

    .rm-SearchToggle {
        width: 800px;
        max-width: 100%;
        padding: 22px 8px;
        border: 1px solid #ccc;
        border-radius: 5px;
        font-size: 16px;
        text-align: left;
        box-shadow: 0px 4px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
    }


    .Header-bottom2eLKOFXMEmh5 {
        -webkit-box-align: center;
        -ms-flex-align: center;
        align-items: center;
        display: -webkit-box;
        display: -ms-flexbox;
        display: flex;
        min-height: 0;
        overflow: hidden;
        width: 100%;
        height: 0;
    }

    .Header-search_featherYsmQBn55F3d9 {
        -webkit-box-shadow: none;
        box-shadow: none;
    }

    .main-btn {
        padding: 6px 10px;
        border-radius: 4px;
        border: 1px solid var(--white);
        color: var(--blue);
        background-color: var(--white);
    }

    .main-btn:hover {
        transform: scale(1.1);
        background-color: var(--white-07);
    }

    .additional-btn {
        padding: 6px 10px;
        border-radius: 4px;
        border: 1px solid var(--white);
        color: var(--white);
        background-color: transparent;
    }

    .additional-btn:hover {
        color: var(--dark);
        background-color: var(--white-07);
    }
    
    .contrast-btn {
        padding: 6px 10px;
        border-radius: 4px;
        border: 1px solid var(--blue);
        color: var(--blue);
        background-color: var(--white);
    }

    .contrast-btn:hover {
        transform: scale(1.1);
        background-color: var(--white-07);
    }

    .text-center {
        text-align: center;
    }

    .text-opposite {
        color: var(--white);
    }

    .full-width {
        width: 90%;
        max-width: 1820px;
        padding: 0 22px;
        margin: 0 auto;
    }

    .medium-width {
        width: 60%;
        max-width: 1222px;
        padding: 0 22px;
        margin: 0 auto;
    }

.bg-header {
    background-color: var(--dark);
    height: 270px;
    position: relative; /* Ensure pseudo-elements are positioned relative to this */
    overflow: hidden; /* Prevent elements from overflowing */
}

.bg-header::before,
.bg-header::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    z-index: 5;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background-size: 20%;
    background-repeat: no-repeat;
    background-position: 0 50%;
    opacity: 0; /* Initially invisible */
    animation: fade-in 1.5s ease-out forwards; /* Fade-in effect */
}

.bg-header::before {
    left: 0;
    top: -10px;
    background-image: url(https://files.readme.io/03afdc22a7c454890331d3d59fc1dbe46a72bd781847200bdcf70c0dbd242e8f-bg-white-l.svg);
}

.bg-header::after {
    right: -80%;
    top: 10px;
    background-image: url(https://files.readme.io/e05d98cc8e1f8b85002d54ce64cfbac3d18c4b70e64c1bb5920dd95e4cf83a90-bg-white-r.svg);
}

/* Keyframes for fading in */
@keyframes fade-in {
    to {
        opacity: 1; /* Fully visible */
    }
}


    .bg-blue {
        background-color: var(--blue);
    }

    .bg-grey {
        background-color: var(--grey);
    }

    .bg-dark-grey {
        background-color: var(--dark-grey);
    }

    .border-bottom-bright {
        border-bottom: 6px solid var(--orange);
    }

    .card {
        border-color: var(--grey) !important;
        border-width: 2px !important;
        border-radius: 9px !important;
    }

    .card:hover {
        border-color: var(--blue-07) !important;
        transform: scale(1.05);
    }

    .card:hover .bg-grey {
        background-color: var(--blue-07) !important;
    }

    .bg-orange-lines::before {
        content: '';
        position: absolute;
        z-index: 5;
        top: 0;
        left: 0;
        width: 100%;
        height: 100%;
        background-size: 20%;
        background-repeat: no-repeat;
        background-position: 0 50%;
        background-image: url(https://files.readme.io/12839cf64fb4a3463bf6255473ebb07bcce6828749f5233ea8dcb779c7e1bc90-bg-orange-l.svg);
    }

    .scrollmenu-wrapper {
        position: relative;
    }

    .scrollmenu-wrapper::before,
    .scrollmenu-wrapper::after {
        content: "";
        position: absolute;
        z-index: 5;
        top: 0;
        bottom: 0;
        width: 10%;
    }

    .scrollmenu-wrapper::before {
        left: 0;
        background: linear-gradient(to right, var(--blue), transparent)
    }

    .scrollmenu-wrapper::after {
        right: 0;
        background: linear-gradient(to right, transparent, var(--blue))
    }

    .scrollmenu {
        padding-bottom: 50px;
        overflow: auto;
        white-space: nowrap;
    }

    .scrollmenu .link-wrapper {
        display: inline-block;
        text-align: center;
        margin: 14px;
    }

    .scrollmenu a {
        text-decoration: none;
    }

    .slider-item {
        width: 225px;
        height: 150px;
        border: 1px solid var(--blue);
        border-radius: 8px;
        background-color: var(--white);
        transition: 0.3s;
    }

    .link-wrapper:first-child {
        margin-left: 50px;
    }

    .link-wrapper:last-child {
        margin-right: 50px;
    }

    .slider-item:hover {
        transform: scale(1.1);
    }

    .slider-item:hover .slider-item-title,
    .slider-item:hover a {
        color: var(--black);
    }

    .partner-img {
        display: flex;
        justify-content: center;
        align-items: center;
        height: 82px;
        /* width: 100%; */
        overflow: hidden;
    }

    .partner-img img {
        max-width: 100%;
        max-height: 100%;
    }
	
	.alert-text {
		font-family: var(--Roboto);
		font-size: 16px;
	}

    .slider-item-title {
        font-size: 16px;
        font-weight: 400;
        font-family: var(--Roboto);
    }

    .widget-wrapper {
        display: flex;
        justify-content: center;
        align-items: flex-start;
    }

    .widget-wrapper img {
        width: 100%;
        max-width: 440px;
    }

    .footer-section {
        background-color: var(--black);
    }

    .copyright {
        font-family: var(--Roboto);
        font-size: 14px;
        font-weight: 400;
        line-height: 18px;
    }

    .buttons-wrp {
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: row;
        justify-content: center;
        align-items: stretch;
    }

    @media (min-width: 1500px) {

        .bg-header::before,
        .bg-header::after,
        .bg-orange-lines::before {
            background-size: 15%;
        }

        .bg-header::after {
            right: -85%;
        }
    }

    @media (max-width: 1200px) {
        .full-width {
            width: 100%;
        }

        .medium-width {
            width: 80%;
        }

        .bg-header::before {
            left: -10%;
            background-size: auto 100%;
        }

        .bg-header::after {
            right: -90%;
            background-size: auto 100%;
        }

        .bg-orange-lines::before {
            opacity: 0.4;
        }
    }

    @media (max-width: 800px) {
        .medium-width {
            width: 100%;
        }

        .bg-header::before,
        .bg-header::after,
        .bg-orange-lines::before {
            background-image: none;
        }
    }

    @media (max-width: 500px) {
        .buttons-wrp {
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .buttons-wrp>div {
            text-align: center;
        }
    }


    .scrollmenu {
        display: flex;
        overflow: hidden;
        white-space: nowrap;
        position: relative;
        scroll-behavior: smooth;
    }

    .scrollmenu .link-wrapper {
        flex: 0 0 auto;
        transition: transform 0.3s ease-in-out;
    }
  
  
    
</style>

<style>
/* Ensure the row wraps and applies a gutter so text doesn’t overlap the image */
.pathfinder-section .row {
  flex-wrap: wrap;           /* allow wrapping if space is tight */
  --bs-gutter-x: 30px;       /* horizontal gap between columns; adjust as needed */
}

/* Allow the text column to shrink/wrap properly */
.pathfinder-section .col-md-8 {
  min-width: 0;              /* important for flex items to prevent overflow */
}


  
  @media (max-width: 1100px) {
.pathfinder-section img {
  max-width: 200px !important;
  height: auto;
}
}
</style>
<script>
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
        const scrollmenu = document.querySelector(".scrollmenu");
        let scrollAmount = 0;

        function autoScroll() {
            scrollmenu.scrollBy({ left: 1, behavior: "smooth" });
            scrollAmount++;

            // Reset scroll to the start when reaching the end
            if (scrollAmount >= scrollmenu.scrollWidth - scrollmenu.clientWidth) {
                scrollmenu.scrollTo({ left: 0, behavior: "smooth" });
                scrollAmount = 0;
            }
        }

        // Start auto-scrolling every 20ms
        const autoScrollInterval = setInterval(autoScroll, 20);

        // Pause scrolling on mouseover and resume on mouseout
        scrollmenu.addEventListener("mouseover", () => clearInterval(autoScrollInterval));
        scrollmenu.addEventListener("mouseout", () => setInterval(autoScroll, 20));
    });
</script>

<div>
    <section class="bg-header">
        <div class="medium-width p-3">
            <div class="row">
                <div class="col my-2">
                    <h1 class="py-2 text-opposite text-center">BeyondTrust Documentation</h1>
                    <h4 class="py-2 text-opposite text-center">Get product guides, resources, and the latest technical information about BeyondTrust products.</h4>
                    <div class="search py-2"></div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>
  
  
<section class="pathfinder-section" style="padding:20px;">
  <div class="full-width p-3">
    <div class="row align-items-start">
      <!-- Image column -->
      <div class="col-12 col-md-4 text-center mb-3 mb-md-0">
        <a href="https://docs.beyondtrust.com/bt-docs/docs/welcome-to-the-pathfinder-platform">
          <img 
            src="https://files.readme.io/d2ece742ef432fdfddbfe9ca2f696b49f48dd00c5a90138115e616a54176c235-image.png" 
            alt="Pathfinder diagram" 
            class="img-fluid" 
            style="max-width:350px;"
          >
         </a>
      </div>
      <!-- Text column -->
      <div class="col-12 col-md-8">
        <h2 class="text-center text-md-start">
          Meet Pathfinder: The only single-platform approach to managing your identity attack surface.
        </h2>
        <h3 class="mt-3 text-center text-md-start" style="font-weight:bold;">
          One platform, infinite identity security
        </h3>
        <p class="mt-3 body-font">
          Pathfinder enhances the capabilities of BeyondTrust’s entire product suite. With the integrated Pathfinder Platform, customers can benefit from the broad and deep capabilities reflected in our multi category identity security leadership, which spans 
          <strong>Privileged Access Management (PAM), Identity Threat Detection and Response (ITDR), Cloud Identity Management, and Cloud Infrastructure Entitlement Management (CIEM).</strong>
        </p>
        <p class="body-font">
          As the focal point of your identity security defense-in-depth, Pathfinder also leverages third-party connectors and deep integrations with your other favorite toolsets to expand visibility, security, governance, and operational synergies.
        </p>
        <p>
          <a href="https://docs.beyondtrust.com/bt-docs/docs/welcome-to-the-pathfinder-platform">
            <button class="contrast-btn">Learn more &gt;</button>
          </a>
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- end new Pathfinder section -->

<!-- start new section -->

<section class="bg-blue">
  <div class="medium-width p-3">
    <div class="row">
      <div class="col-sm-12 mt-3">
        <h2 class="text-center" style="color:white;font-size: 30px;">Get your identity security snapshot</h2>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="row align-items-center">
      <div class="col-sm-12 col-md-12 col-lg-6">
        <img src="https://files.readme.io/e219fd6614fb97471e7aee877dd2f5d975c4c44f3bf6f5afa258ba344656144b-image.png" alt="A generalized breakdown of identities, identity risks, and Paths to Privilege." class="img-fluid">
      </div><div class="col-sm-12 col-md-12 col-lg-6 alert-text">
        <p style="color:white">
          Run a read-only scan of AD, Entra ID, AWS, Okta and other major platforms to uncover:
        </p>
        <ul style="color:white">
          <li>Dormant or inactive accounts</li>
          <li>Misconfigurations &amp; over-permissive roles</li>
          <li>Privilege-escalation &amp; lateral-movement paths</li>
        </ul>
        <p style="color:white">
          Get a risk-ranked remediation report with clear, prioritized fixes.
        </p>
        <p>
          
        <a href="https://www.beyondtrust.com/products/identity-security-insights/assessment?utm_source=tech-docs-home&amp;utm_medium=tech-docs-footer&amp;utm_content=ISRA&amp;campid=701Vw00000GwAHAIA3">            
     <button class="main-btn">Get your free report</button>
    </a></p>
      </div>
      
      
    </div>
  </div>
</section>



<!-- end new section -->

    <section class="bg-dark-grey border-bottom-bright bg-orange-lines">
        <div class="medium-width py-3" style="position: relative; z-index: 10;">
            <div class="row">
                <div class="col-12 my-3">
                    <h2 class="text-opposite text-center">Find out more about BeyondTrust</h2>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="row my-3">
                <div class="col-sm-12 col-md-6 col-xl-8">
                    <p class="text-opposite">BeyondTrust is the global identity security leader protecting Paths to Privilege™. Our identity-centric approach goes beyond securing privileges and access, empowering organizations with the most effective solution to manage the entire identity attack surface and neutralize threats, whether from external attacks or insiders. 
                  </p>
                    <p class="text-opposite">BeyondTrust is leading the charge in transforming identity security to prevent breaches and limit the blast radius of attacks, while creating a superior customer experience and operational efficiencies. We are trusted by 20,000 customers, including 75 of the Fortune 100, and our global ecosystem of partners.</p>
                    <p class="pt-4 text-opposite">Learn more at <a class="text-opposite text-link"
                            href="https://www.beyondtrust.com">www.beyondtrust.com</a></p>

   .scrollmenu .link-wrapper {\n        display: inline-block;\n        text-align: center;\n        margin: 14px;\n    }\n\n    .scrollmenu a {\n        text-decoration: none;\n    }\n\n    .slider-item {\n        width: 225px;\n        height: 150px;\n        border: 1px solid var(--blue);\n        border-radius: 8px;\n        background-color: var(--white);\n        transition: 0.3s;\n    }\n\n    .link-wrapper:first-child {\n        margin-left: 50px;\n    }\n\n    .link-wrapper:last-child {\n        margin-right: 50px;\n    }\n\n    .slider-item:hover {\n        transform: scale(1.1);\n    }\n\n    .slider-item:hover .slider-item-title,\n    .slider-item:hover a {\n        color: var(--black);\n    }\n\n    .partner-img {\n        display: flex;\n        justify-content: center;\n        align-items: center;\n        height: 82px;\n        /* width: 100%; */\n        overflow: hidden;\n    }\n\n    .partner-img img {\n        max-width: 100%;\n        max-height: 100%;\n    }\n\t\n\t.alert-text {\n\t\tfont-family: var(--Roboto);\n\t\tfont-size: 16px;\n\t}\n\n    .slider-item-title {\n        font-size: 16px;\n        font-weight: 400;\n        font-family: var(--Roboto);\n    }\n\n    .widget-wrapper {\n        display: flex;\n        justify-content: center;\n        align-items: flex-start;\n    }\n\n    .widget-wrapper img {\n        width: 100%;\n        max-width: 440px;\n    }\n\n    .footer-section {\n        background-color: var(--black);\n    }\n\n    .copyright {\n        font-family: var(--Roboto);\n        font-size: 14px;\n        font-weight: 400;\n        line-height: 18px;\n    }\n\n    .buttons-wrp {\n        display: flex;\n        flex-direction: row;\n        justify-content: center;\n        align-items: stretch;\n    }\n\n    @media (min-width: 1500px) {\n\n        .bg-header::before,\n        .bg-header::after,\n        .bg-orange-lines::before {\n            background-size: 15%;\n        }\n\n        .bg-header::after {\n            right: -85%;\n        }\n    }\n\n    @media (max-width: 1200px) {\n        .full-width {\n            width: 100%;\n        }\n\n        .medium-width {\n            width: 80%;\n        }\n\n        .bg-header::before {\n            left: -10%;\n            background-size: auto 100%;\n        }\n\n        .bg-header::after {\n            right: -90%;\n            background-size: auto 100%;\n        }\n\n        .bg-orange-lines::before {\n            opacity: 0.4;\n        }\n    }\n\n    @media (max-width: 800px) {\n        .medium-width {\n            width: 100%;\n        }\n\n        .bg-header::before,\n        .bg-header::after,\n        .bg-orange-lines::before {\n            background-image: none;\n        }\n    }\n\n    @media (max-width: 500px) {\n        .buttons-wrp {\n            flex-direction: column;\n            align-items: center;\n        }\n\n        .buttons-wrp>div {\n            text-align: center;\n        }\n    }\n\n\n    .scrollmenu {\n        display: flex;\n        overflow: hidden;\n        white-space: nowrap;\n        position: relative;\n        scroll-behavior: smooth;\n    }\n\n    .scrollmenu .link-wrapper {\n        flex: 0 0 auto;\n        transition: transform 0.3s ease-in-out;\n    }\n  \n  \n    \n\u003c/style>\n\n\u003cstyle>\n/* Ensure the row wraps and applies a gutter so text doesn’t overlap the image */\n.pathfinder-section .row {\n  flex-wrap: wrap;           /* allow wrapping if space is tight */\n  --bs-gutter-x: 30px;       /* horizontal gap between columns; adjust as needed */\n}\n\n/* Allow the text column to shrink/wrap properly */\n.pathfinder-section .col-md-8 {\n  min-width: 0;              /* important for flex items to prevent overflow */\n}\n\n\n  \n  @media (max-width: 1100px) {\n.pathfinder-section img {\n  max-width: 200px !important;\n  height: auto;\n}\n}\n\u003c/style>\n\u003cscript>\n    document.addEventListener(\"DOMContentLoaded\", () => {\n        const scrollmenu = document.querySelector(\".scrollmenu\");\n        let scrollAmount = 0;\n\n        function autoScroll() {\n            scrollmenu.scrollBy({ left: 1, behavior: \"smooth\" });\n            scrollAmount++;\n\n            // Reset scroll to the start when reaching the end\n            if (scrollAmount >= scrollmenu.scrollWidth - scrollmenu.clientWidth) {\n                scrollmenu.scrollTo({ left: 0, behavior: \"smooth\" });\n                scrollAmount = 0;\n            }\n        }\n\n        // Start auto-scrolling every 20ms\n        const autoScrollInterval = setInterval(autoScroll, 20);\n\n        // Pause scrolling on mouseover and resume on mouseout\n        scrollmenu.addEventListener(\"mouseover\", () => clearInterval(autoScrollInterval));\n        scrollmenu.addEventListener(\"mouseout\", () => setInterval(autoScroll, 20));\n    });\n\u003c/script>\n\n\u003cdiv>\n    \u003csection class=\"bg-header\">\n        \u003cdiv class=\"medium-width p-3\">\n            \u003cdiv class=\"row\">\n                \u003cdiv class=\"col my-2\">\n                    \u003ch1 class=\"py-2 text-opposite text-center\">BeyondTrust Documentation\u003c/h1>\n                    \u003ch4 class=\"py-2 text-opposite text-center\">Get product guides, resources, and the latest technical information about BeyondTrust products.\u003c/h4>\n                    \u003cdiv class=\"search py-2\">\u003c/div>\n                \u003c/div>\n            \u003c/div>\n        \u003c/div>\n \u003ch2 class=\"text-center text-md-start\">\n          Meet Pathfinder: The only single-platform approach to managing your identity attack surface.\n        \u003c/h2>\n        \u003ch3 class=\"mt-3 text-center text-md-start\" style=\"font-weight:bold;\">\n          One platform, infinite identity security\n        \u003c/h3>\n        \u003cp class=\"mt-3 body-font\">\n          Pathfinder enhances the capabilities of BeyondTrust’s entire product suite. With the integrated Pathfinder Platform, customers can benefit from the broad and deep capabilities reflected in our multi category identity security leadership, which spans \n          \u003cstrong>Privileged Access Management (PAM), Identity Threat Detection and Response (ITDR), Cloud Identity Management, and Cloud Infrastructure Entitlement Management (CIEM).\u003c/strong>\n        \u003c/p>\n        \u003cp class=\"body-font\">\n          As the focal point of your identity security defense-in-depth, Pathfinder also leverages third-party connectors and deep integrations with your other favorite toolsets to expand visibility, security, governance, and operational synergies.\n        \u003c/p>\n        \u003cp>\n          \u003ca Last modified 3/11/26 by Jenny */\n\nbody {\n  /* Colors come from the Shield design system */\n  --gray-100: #f4f5f7;\n  --gray-200: #e4e7ec;\n  --gray-300: #d1d1d6; /*border*/\n  --gray-400: #9da4ae;\n  --gray-500: #6c737f;\n  --gray-600: #475467;\n  --gray-700: #384250;\n  --gray-800: #1f2a37;\n  --gray-900: #111927;\n  --gray-950: #0c111d;\n  \n  --blue-100: #1c63a5; /*text active, focus, selected item*/\n  --blue-200: #1771c6; /*text hover*/\n  --black-400: #949494; /*dark: border*/\n  --black-500: #6b6b6b;\n\n  --sky-blue-100: #53b1fd; /*dark: text active, focus, selected item*/\n  --sky-blue-200: #7cc3fd; /*dark: text hover*/\n\n  --navy-50: #e9ebec;\n  --navy-100: #c8cdd1;\n\n  --color-bg-page: #ffffff; /*light: background*/\n  --brand-orange: #ff5500;\n}\n\n@media (prefers-color-scheme: light) {\n    body {\n        --color-bg-page: #ffffff; /*light: background*/\n    }\n}\n[data-color-mode=\"light\"] body {\n    --color-bg-page: #ffffff; /*dark: === Custom Orange Callouts === */\n.callout.callout_warn[theme=\"⚠️\"],\n.callout.callout_warning[theme=\"⚠️\"] {\n    --Callout-bg: var(--background, rgba(255, 165, 0, 0.13));  /* light orange background */\n    --Callout-border: var(--border, rgba(255, 165, 0, 1));   /* solid orange border */\n    --Callout-title: var(--title, #000);                  /* black title */\n}\n\n@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {\n  [data-color-mode=\"system\"] blockquote.callout.callout_warn[theme=\"⚠️\"] .heading,\n  [data-color-mode=\"system\"] blockquote.callout.callout_warning[theme=\"⚠️\"] .heading {\n    color: #ffd885 !important;\n  }\n\n  [data-color-mode=\"system\"] .App details {\n     --details-bg: #1f2937 !important;\n  }\n}\n\n[data-color-mode=\"dark\"] {\n  --details-bg: #1f2937 !important;\n}\n\n/* === Fix spacing in callouts without headers === */\n\n.callout > span + p + ol,\n.callout > span + p + ul {\n  margin-bottom: -20px !important;\n  transform: translateY(-20px);\n}\n\n/* === Fix spacing below images === */\n\nspan.img + p,\nspan.img + blockquote,\nspan.img + div,\nspan.img + ul,\nspan.img + ol {\n    margin-top: 20px;\n}\n\n\n/* 0.2) !important;\n  }\n  \n  [data-color-mode=\"system\"] .callout.callout_info {\n    --background: rgba(var(--blue-rgb), 0.2) !important;\n  }\n  \n  [data-color-mode=\"system\"] match[1]; // capture \"project\" part\n    var target = \"/\" + project + \"/docs/\" + project + \"-release-notes\";\n    window.location.replace(target);\n  }\n})();\n\n\n\n\n// Removes the h1 pipe and following text from the page view, the side nav, and the footer links,\n// using the content to the right of the pipe only in search results.\n(function () {\n  const PIPE = '|';\n\n  function splitPipe(str) {\n    const i = str.indexOf(PIPE);\n    if (i === -1) return { before: str.trim(), after: '' };\n    return {\n      before: str.slice(0, i).trim(),\n      after: str.slice(i + 1).trim(),\n    };\n  }\n\n  // ---- Sidebar / Title / Pagination (on each ReadMe page load) ----\n  function cleanSidebarAndTitles() {\n    // Navigation items\n    document.querySelectorAll('.rm-Sidebar-link .Sidebar-link-text_label1gCT_uPnx7Gu, .rm-Sidebar-link [class*=\"Sidebar-link-text_label\"], [class*=\"PaginationControls-text\"], .Button-label').forEach(el => {\n      if (!el) return;\n      const t = el.textContent || '';\n      if (t.includes(PIPE)) el.textContent = splitPipe(t).before;\n    });\n\n    // Page title\n    const h1 = document.querySelector('#content-head h1');\n    if (h1 && h1.textContent.includes(PIPE)) {\n      h1.textContent = splitPipe(h1.textContent).before;\n    }\n  }\n  \n  new MutationObserver(() => cleanSidebarAndTitles()).observe(document.body, {\n    childList: true,\n    subtree: true,\n  });\n  \n  cleanSidebarAndTitles();\n\n  // ---- Search results formatting ----\n  function processSearchResults() {\n    const modal = document.getElementById('hub-search-results');\n    if (!modal) return;\n\n    // Each result card anchor\n    modal.querySelectorAll('a[class*=\"SearchResults-Result\"]').forEach(result => {\n      if (!result || result.dataset.pipeProcessed === '1') return;\n\n      // Title: keep only BEFORE the pipe, preserve project chip\n      const titleEl = result.querySelector('[class*=\"SearchResults-Result-Title\"]');\n      if (titleEl) {\n        // Grab optional project span before we rewrite\n        const projectEl = titleEl.querySelector('[class*=\"SearchResults-Result-Project\"]');\n        const projectClone = projectEl ? projectEl.cloneNode(true) : null;\n\n        // Compute from text (or title attribute as backup)\n        const rawTitle = (titleEl.textContent || titleEl.getAttribute('title') || '').trim();\n        if (rawTitle.includes(PIPE)) {\n          const { before } = splitPipe(rawTitle);\n          // Rebuild title content safely\n          titleEl.textContent = before;\n          if (projectClone) titleEl.appendChild(projectClone);\n        }\n      }\n\n      // Excerpt: show only AFTER the pipe (no highlight preservation by design)\n      const excerptContainer = result.querySelector('[class*=\"SearchResults-Result-Excerpt\"] .ais-Snippet');\n      if (excerptContainer) {\n        const raw = (excerptContainer.textContent || '').trim();\n        if (raw.includes(PIPE)) {\n          const { after } = splitPipe(raw);\n          // Replace with plain nonHighlighted span (matches Algolia CSS)\n          excerptContainer.innerHTML = `\u003cspan class=\"ais-Snippet-nonHighlighted\">${after}\u003c/span>`;\n        }\n      }\n\n      result.dataset.pipeProcessed = '1';\n    });\n  }\n\n  // ---- Observer that reacts whenever the modal or its contents change ----\n  function ensureSearchObserver() {\n    if (window.__pipeObserverReady) return;\n    window.__pipeObserverReady = true;\n\n    let scheduled = false;\n    const schedule = () => {\n      if (scheduled) return;\n      scheduled = true;\n      requestAnimationFrame(() => {\n        scheduled = false;\n        processSearchResults();\n      });\n    };\n\n    // Global observer: fires when search modal mounts / updates\n    const bodyObserver = new MutationObserver(() => {\n      // If modal exists, (re)process results\n      if (document.getElementById('hub-search-results')) schedule();\n    });\n    bodyObserver.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });\n\n    // Also hook input typing in the Algolia box for immediate updates\n    document.addEventListener('input', (e) => {\n      const t = e.target;\n      if (t && t.matches('input[type=\"search\"], .SearchBox-InputUQZAW9QXMe-c, [class*=\"SearchBox-Input\"]')) {\n        schedule();\n      }\n    }, true);\n\n    // First pass (if modal is already open)\n    schedule();\n  }\n\n  // Run on each ReadMe SPA page load\n  $(window).on('pageLoad', () => {\n    cleanSidebarAndTitles();\n    ensureSearchObserver();\n  });\n\n  // Also run once immediately in case this is injected after pageLoad\n  cleanSidebarAndTitles();\n  ensureSearchObserver();\n})();\n\n\n\n/***************************************************************\n * 9) *Continuging from header includes - On DOM load: build everything, default to Product\n ***************************************************************/\n$(window).on('pageLoad', function(e, state) {\n    if (!window.location.pathname.includes(\"/docs/integrations\")) {\n        console.log(\"Not an integrations page. Script aborted.\");\n        return;\n    }\n\n    console.log(\"Integrations page detected. Initializing categories...\");\n\n    const anchorFrag = window.location.hash; // e.g., \"#microsoft\"\n\n    setTimeout(() => {\n        populateCategories();\n\n        // Now that categories are populated, select the correct tab\n        let category;\n        \n        if (!anchorFrag) {\n            category = \"Product\";\n        } else {\n            category = checkAnchor(anchorFrag); // DOM-based\n        }\n\n        filterByCategory(category);\n\n        // Allow time for category change, then jump to the anchor\n        setTimeout(() => {\n            if (anchorFrag) {\n                const targetElement = document.querySelector(anchorFrag);\n                if (targetElement) {\n                    targetElement.scrollIntoView({ behavior: \"smooth\" });\n\n                    // Open the section automatically\n                    const headerElement = targetElement.closest(\".category\").querySelector(\".category-header\");\n                    if (headerElement) toggleCategory(headerElement);\n                    // toggleCategory lives in the custom HTML\n                }\n            }\n        }, 200); // Short delay to ensure category rendering completes\n    }, 800); // Allow categories to fully populate\n});\n\nfunction checkAnchor(anchorFrag) {\n    if (!anchorFrag) {\n        console.log(\"No anchor, defaulting to Product\");\n        return \"Product\";\n    }\n\n    // Remove leading '#' to match element IDs\n    const anchorId = anchorFrag.slice(1);\n    const targetElement = document.getElementById(anchorId);\n\n    if (!targetElement) {\n        console.log(\"Unknown anchor, defaulting to Product: \" + anchorFrag);\n        return \"Product\";\n    }\n\n    // Find the closest parent .category and read its data-category\n    const categoryDiv = targetElement.closest(\".category\");\n    if (categoryDiv) {\n        const category = categoryDiv.getAttribute(\"data-category\") || \"Product\";\n        console.log(\"Found anchor, category: \" + category);\n        return category;\n    }\n\n    // Fallback\n    console.log(\"Anchor exists but no category found, defaulting to Product: \" + anchorFrag);\n    return \"Product\";\n}\n\n////////////////////////////////////////////////\n//////     Project Title in Nav Bar     ///////\n////////////////////////////////////////////////\nfunction insertProjectTitle() {\n    // Find the meta tag with property \"og:site_name\"\n    var metaTitle = document.querySelector('meta[property=\"og:site_name\"]');\n    \n    if (metaTitle && metaTitle.content.trim() !== \"\") {\n      // Find the navigation bar by its ID\n      var navBar = document.getElementById(\"hub-sidebar\");\n      if (navBar) {\n        // Remove any existing title element to avoid duplicates\n        var existingTitle = navBar.querySelector(\".project-title\");\n        if (existingTitle) {\n          existingTitle.remove();\n        }\n        \n        // Create a new element to display the title\n        var titleEl = document.createElement(\"span\");\n        titleEl.textContent = metaTitle.content;\n        titleEl.className = \"project-title\"; // Optional: for additional styling\n        \n        // Apply inline styles matching your CSS\n        titleEl.style.padding = \"20px 0 5px 8px\";\n        titleEl.style.fontWeight = \"bold\";\n        titleEl.style.fontSize = \"12px\";\n        titleEl.style.borderBottom = \"1px solid grey\";\n        titleEl.style.marginLeft = \"10px\";\n        \n        // Insert the title element as the first child of the navigation bar\n        navBar.insertBefore(titleEl, navBar.firstChild);\n      }\n    }\n  }\n  \n  // Run on initial page load\n  document.addEventListener(\"DOMContentLoaded\", insertProjectTitle);\n  \n  // Run on every subsequent page load within the SPA (ReadMe's pageLoad event)\n  $(window).on('pageLoad', function(e, state) {\n    insertProjectTitle();\n  });\n  \n  \n  \n  ////////////////////////////////////////////////\n  //////  Release Notes Table of Contents ///////\n  ////////////////////////////////////////////////\n (function() {\n  function isChangelogPage() {\n    return window.location.pathname.indexOf('/changelog/') !== -1;\n  }\n\n  function initChangelogTOC() {\n    if (!isChangelogPage()) return;\n\n    // Remove any existing TOC\n    var existingTOC = document.querySelector('.content-toc.grid-25');\n    if (existingTOC) {\n      existingTOC.parentNode.removeChild(existingTOC);\n    }\n\n    // Inject CSS for two-column layout\n    if (!document.getElementById('changelog-toc-style')) {\n      var style = document.createElement('style');\n      style.id = 'changelog-toc-style';\n      style.innerHTML = `\n        .rm-Container.rm-ContainerNarrow {\n          display: flex;\n          flex-direction: row;\n          gap: 20px;\n        }\n        .rm-Changelog .ChangelogPage3Hd1EE55GPPg {\n          flex: 0 0 70%;\n          max-width: 70%;\n        }\n        .rm-Changelog .content-toc.grid-25 {\n          flex: 0 0 30%;\n          max-width: 30%;\n          position: sticky;\n          top: 20px;\n        }\n      `;\n      document.head.appendChild(style);\n    }\n\n    // Select all h2 and h3 changelog headings\n    var headingElements = document.querySelectorAll('.ChangelogPost_text25nFcEF_ZQyf h2.heading, .ChangelogPost_text25nFcEF_ZQyf h3.heading');\n    if (!headingElements.length) {\n      console.log(\"No headings found\");\n      return;\n    }\n\n    // Build the TOC container\n    var tocSection = document.createElement('section');\n    tocSection.className = 'content-toc grid-25';\n\n    var nav = document.createElement('nav');\n    var tocList = document.createElement('ul');\n    tocList.className = 'toc-list';\n\n    var headerListItem = document.createElement('li');\n    var headerLink = document.createElement('a');\n    headerLink.className = 'tocHeader';\n    headerLink.href = '#';\n    headerLink.innerHTML = '\u003ci class=\"icon icon-text-align-left\">\u003c/i>Table of Contents';\n    headerListItem.appendChild(headerLink);\n    tocList.appendChild(headerListItem);\n\n    var childrenListItem = document.createElement('li');\n    childrenListItem.className = 'toc-children';\n    var childrenUl = document.createElement('ul');\n\n    // Keep track of the most recent H2 TOC item\n    var currentH2Item = null;\n\n    headingElements.forEach(function(heading) {\n      var level = heading.tagName.toLowerCase(); // 'h2' or 'h3'\n      var anchor = heading.querySelector('.heading-anchor.anchor.waypoint');\n\n      if (anchor && anchor.id) {\n        var headingTextElem = heading.querySelector('.heading-text');\n        var headingText = headingTextElem ? headingTextElem.textContent.trim() : heading.textContent.trim();\n\n        if (level === 'h2') {\n          // Create a TOC entry for H2\n          var h2Item = document.createElement('li');\n          var h2Link = document.createElement('a');\n          h2Link.href = '#' + anchor.id;\n          h2Link.textContent = headingText;\n          h2Item.appendChild(h2Link);\n\n          // Prepare a nested \u003cul> for any child H3s\n          var h3Sublist = document.createElement('ul');\n          h2Item.appendChild(h3Sublist);\n\n          childrenUl.appendChild(h2Item);\n\n          // Set currentH2Item for the next H3s\n          currentH2Item = h2Item;\n\n        } else if (level === 'h3' && currentH2Item) {\n          // Create a TOC entry for H3 nested inside the current H2\n          var h3Item = document.createElement('li');\n          var h3Link = document.createElement('a');\n          h3Link.href = '#' + anchor.id;\n          h3Link.textContent = headingText;\n          h3Item.appendChild(h3Link);\n\n          var h3Sublist = currentH2Item.querySelector('ul');\n          if (h3Sublist) {\n            h3Sublist.appendChild(h3Item);\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    });\n\n    childrenListItem.appendChild(childrenUl);\n    tocList.appendChild(childrenListItem);\n    nav.appendChild(tocList);\n    tocSection.appendChild(nav);\n\n    var article = document.querySelector('article');\n    if (article) {\n      article.parentNode.insertBefore(tocSection, article.nextSibling);\n    } else {\n      console.log(\"Article element not found.\");\n    }\n  }\n\n  $(window).on('pageLoad', function(e, state) {\n    setTimeout(initChangelogTOC, 500);\n  });\n\n  if (document.readyState === \"complete\") {\n    setTimeout(initChangelogTOC, 1500);\n  }\n})();\n\n// Delay everything by 1 second to avoid hydration conflicts and ensure React has finished mounting\nsetTimeout(() => {\n  ////////////////////////////////////////////\n  //    Custom Release Notes Script\n  ////////////////////////////////////////////\n\n  // Mapping for section-specific details\n  const sections = {\n    adb: {\n      rssUrl: \"https://docs.beyondtrust.com/adb/changelog.rss\",\n      pagePath: \"/adb/docs/adb-release-notes\",\n    },\n    bips: {\n      rssUrl: \"https://docs.beyondtrust.com/bips/changelog.rss\",\n      pagePath: \"/bips/docs/bips-release-notes\",\n    },\n    \"epm-l\": {\n      rssUrl: \"https://docs.beyondtrust.com/epm-l/changelog.rss\",\n      pagePath: \"/epm-l/docs/epm-l-release-notes\",\n    },\n    \"epm-ul\": {\n      rssUrl: \"https://docs.beyondtrust.com/epm-ul/changelog.rss\",\n      pagePath: \"/epm-ul/docs/epm-ul-release-notes\",\n    },\n    \"epm-wm\": {\n      rssUrl: \"https://docs.beyondtrust.com/epm-wm/changelog.rss\",\n      pagePath: \"/epm-wm/docs/epm-wm-release-notes\",\n    },\n    insights: {\n      rssUrl: \"https://docs.beyondtrust.com/insights/changelog.rss\",\n      pagePath: \"/insights/docs/insights-release-notes\",\n    },\n    pra: {\n      rssUrl: \"https://docs.beyondtrust.com/pra/changelog.rss\",\n      pagePath: \"/pra/docs/pra-release-notes\",\n    },\n    rs: {\n      rssUrl: \"https://docs.beyondtrust.com/rs/changelog.rss\",\n      pagePath: \"/rs/docs/rs-release-notes\",\n    },\n    \"bt-docs\": {\n      rssUrl: \"https://docs.beyondtrust.com/bt-docs/changelog.rss\",\n      pagePath: \"/bt-docs/docs/pf-release-notes\",\n    },\n    entitle: {\n      rssUrl: \"https://docs.beyondtrust.com/entitle/changelog.rss\",\n      pagePath: \"/entitle/docs/entitle-release-notes\",\n    },\n  };\n\n  // Fetch & render RSS feed\n  async function fetchRSSFeed(rssUrl) {\n    const loadingSpinner = document.getElementById(\"loading-spinner\");\n    const feedContainer   = document.getElementById(\"rss-feed\");\n    const viewMoreButton  = document.getElementById(\"view-more-button\");\n\n    try {\n      loadingSpinner.style.display = \"flex\";\n      const resp = await fetch(rssUrl);\n      const text = await resp.text();\n      const xml  = new DOMParser().parseFromString(text, \"application/xml\");\n      const items = Array.from(xml.querySelectorAll(\"item\"));\n      const dateRegex = /^[A-Za-z]+\\s\\d{1,2},\\s\\d{4}\\s+/;\n      const perPage = 6;\n      let page = 1;\n\n      function render(start, end) {\n        items.slice(start, end).forEach((item) => {\n          let title = item\n            .querySelector(\"title\")\n            .textContent\n            .replace(/release notes/i, \"\")\n            .trim();\n          const link = item.querySelector(\"link\").textContent;\n          const date = new Date(\n            item.querySelector(\"pubDate\").textContent\n          ).toDateString();\n          const descRaw   = item.querySelector(\"description\")?.textContent || \"\";\n          const descClean = descRaw.replace(dateRegex, \"\");\n          let desc = descClean;\n          if (descClean.length > 200) {\n            const w = descClean\n              .substring(0, 200)\n              .split(\" \")\n              .slice(0, -1)\n              .join(\" \");\n            desc = `${w}... \u003ca href=\"${link}\">View More\u003c/a>`;\n          }\n\n          const div = document.createElement(\"div\");\n          div.className = \"feed-item\";\n          div.innerHTML = `\n            \u003ca href=\"${link}\" target=\"_blank\">${title}\u003c/a>\n            \u003cdiv class=\"feed-date\">${date}\u003c/div>\n            \u003cdiv class=\"feed-description\">${desc}\u003c/div>\n          `;\n          feedContainer.appendChild(div);\n        });\n      }\n\n      render(0, perPage);\n      if (items.length > perPage) viewMoreButton.style.display = \"block\";\n\n      viewMoreButton.addEventListener(\"click\", () => {\n        const next  = page + 1;\n        const start = page * perPage;\n        const end   = Math.min(next * perPage, items.length);\n        if (start \u003c items.length) {\n          render(start, end);\n          page = next;\n        }\n        if (end >= items.length) viewMoreButton.style.display = \"none\";\n      });\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.error(\"RSS load error:\", err);\n      document.getElementById(\"rss-feed\").innerHTML =\n        \"\u003cp>Failed to load RSS feed.\u003c/p>\";\n    } finally {\n      loadingSpinner.style.display = \"none\";\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Add \"View All Posts\" back button\n  function addCustomBackButton() {\n    const parts = window.location.pathname.split(\"/\");\n    if (parts.length \u003c 3) return;\n    const key     = parts[1];\n    const landing = `/${key}/docs/${key}-release-notes`;\n\n    if (\n      window.location.href.includes(\"/changelog/\") &&\n      !window.location.href.includes(landing)\n    ) {\n      let tries = 0, max = 10;\n      (function attempt() {\n        const dateEl = document.querySelector(\".DateLine\");\n        if (dateEl && !dateEl.querySelector(\".custom-back-button\")) {\n          const btn = document.createElement(\"a\");\n          btn.href        = landing;\n          btn.textContent = \"View All Posts\";\n          btn.className   = \"custom-back-button\";\n          Object.assign(btn.style, {\n            display: \"inline-block\",\n            padding: \"6px 10px\",\n            marginLeft: \"10px\",\n            backgroundColor: \"#253746\",\n            color: \"#FFF\",\n            textDecoration: \"none\",\n            borderRadius: \"6px\",\n            fontSize: \"11px\",\n            cursor: \"pointer\",\n          });\n          dateEl.appendChild(btn);\n        } else if (tries++ \u003c max) {\n          setTimeout(attempt, 300);\n        }\n      })();\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Auto‐open first sidebar toggle\n  function openFirstSidebar() {\n    setTimeout(() => {\n      const toggles = document.querySelectorAll(\".category-toggle\");\n      if (toggles.length) toggles[0].click();\n    }, 1000);\n  }\n\n  // Intercept header \"Release Notes\" link\n  function redirectReleaseNotesButtonOnClick() {\n    const landingPages = {\n      adb: \"/adb/docs/adb-release-notes\",\n      bips: \"/bips/docs/bips-release-notes\",\n      \"epm-l\": \"/epm-l/docs/epm-l-release-notes\",\n      \"epm-ul\": \"/epm-ul/docs/epm-ul-release-notes\",\n      \"epm-wm\": \"/epm-wm/docs/epm-wm-release-notes\",\n      insights: \"/insights/docs/insights-release-notes\",\n      pra: \"/pra/docs/pra-release-notes\",\n      rs: \"/rs/docs/rs-release-notes\",\n      \"bt-docs\": \"/bt-docs/docs/pf-release-notes\", // added to match `sections`\n      entitle: \"/entitle/docs/entitle-release-notes\",\n    };\n\n    document.addEventListener(\"click\", (e) => {\n      const btn = e.target.closest(\n        'a.rm-Header-link[href*=\"/changelog\"]'\n      );\n      if (!btn) return;\n      e.preventDefault();\n      const path    = window.location.pathname;\n      const project = Object.keys(landingPages).find((k) =>\n        path.startsWith(`/${k}/`)\n      );\n      if (project) window.location.href = landingPages[project];\n      else console.warn(\"No matching project key for:\", path);\n    });\n  }\n\n  // —— INIT: run all the pieces ——  \n  const url = window.location.href.toLowerCase();\n\n  Object.values(sections).forEach(({ rssUrl, pagePath }) => {\n    if (url.includes(pagePath)) {\n      fetchRSSFeed(rssUrl);\n      openFirstSidebar();\n    }\n  });\n\n  addCustomBackButton();\n  redirectReleaseNotesButtonOnClick();\n\n}, 1000); // ← Adjust this delay (ms) as needed\n\n\n// Wait for the page to load so bookmarks acutally take you to the right place on the page    \n    window.addEventListener('load', () => {\n      const hash = window.location.hash;\n      if (hash) {\n        // Wait a moment to ensure the page (and any async content) has rendered\n        setTimeout(() => {\n          const target = document.querySelector(hash);\n          if (target) target.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });\n        }, 500); // adjust the delay (in ms) as needed\n      }\n    });\n\n\n\n    \n    ////////////////////////////////////////////////\n    ////// Blockquote - remove skip to link ////////\n    ////////////////////////////////////////////////\n    \n    document.addEventListener(\"DOMContentLoaded\", () => {\n      // Add a 500ms delay before executing the logic\n      setTimeout(() => {\n        // Find all blockquote elements inside tables\n        const blockquotesInTables = document.querySelectorAll(\"table blockquote\");\n    \n        blockquotesInTables.forEach((blockquote) => {\n          // Check if the blockquote contains an \u003ch2>\n          if (blockquote.querySelector(\"h2\")) {\n            // Find the \u003ch2> inside the blockquote\n            const heading = blockquote.querySelector(\"h2\");\n            if (heading && !heading.classList.contains(\"callout-heading\")) {\n              heading.classList.add(\"callout-heading\"); // Add the class\n            }\n    \n            // Remove \u003ca> tags with aria-label starting with \"Skip link to\"\n            const linksToRemove = blockquote.querySelectorAll(\n              'a.heading-anchor-icon[aria-label^=\"Skip link to\"]'\n            );\n            linksToRemove.forEach((aTag) => aTag.remove());\n          }\n        });\n      }, 500);\n    });\n    \n    ////////////////////////////////////////////////\n    ////// Collapsible Left Navigation Menu ////////\n    ////////////////////////////////////////////////\n    \n    // Function to initialize sidebar toggles\n    function initializeSidebarToggles() {\n        const categoryHeadings = document.querySelectorAll('.Sidebar-headingTRQyOa2pk0gh');\n    \n        categoryHeadings.forEach((heading) => {\n            // Skip if already initialized\n            if (heading.querySelector('button')) return;\n    \n            // Wrap the heading in a button for better accessibility\n            const button = document.createElement('button');\n            button.className = 'category-toggle';\n            button.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');\n            button.textContent = heading.textContent;\n            heading.textContent = '';\n            heading.appendChild(button);\n    \n            // Find the sibling list (category content)\n            const content = heading.nextElementSibling;\n    \n            // Collapse all categories by default\n            if (content) {\n                content.style.display = 'none';\n            }\n    \n            // Add click event listener to toggle visibility\n            button.addEventListener('click', function () {\n                const isExpanded = button.getAttribute('aria-expanded') === 'true';\n                button.setAttribute('aria-expanded', !isExpanded);\n                content.style.display = isExpanded ? 'none' : 'block';\n            });\n        });\n    }\n    \n    // Function to expand the top-level category of the active link\n    function expandTopLevelCategory() {\n        const activeLink = document.querySelector('.Sidebar-link2Dsha-r-GKh2.active');\n        if (activeLink) {\n            const categoryToggle = activeLink\n                .closest('.Sidebar-listWrapper6Q9_yUrG906C')\n                ?.querySelector('.category-toggle');\n    \n            if (categoryToggle) {\n                const isExpanded = categoryToggle.getAttribute('aria-expanded') === 'true';\n                if (!isExpanded) {\n                    const clickEvent = new MouseEvent('click', {\n                        bubbles: true,\n                        cancelable: true,\n                        view: window,\n                    });\n                    categoryToggle.dispatchEvent(clickEvent);\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    \n    // Function to monitor URL changes and re-initialize\n    function monitorRouteChanges() {\n        let currentUrl = location.href;\n    \n        setInterval(() => {\n            if (currentUrl !== location.href) {\n                currentUrl = location.href;\n    \n                if (location.href.includes('/docs/')) {\n                    initializeSidebarToggles();\n                    expandTopLevelCategory();\n                }\n            }\n        }, 100);\n    }\n    \n    // Run the initialization on page load\n    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {\n        if (location.href.includes('/docs/')) {\n            initializeSidebarToggles();\n            expandTopLevelCategory();\n            monitorRouteChanges();\n        }\n    });\n    \n    // Handle pageLoad event for dynamic page changes (if applicable in ReadMe)\n    $(window).on('pageLoad', function () {\n        initializeSidebarToggles();\n        expandTopLevelCategory();\n    });\n    \n    \n    \n    // Show or hide private link based on logged-in status\n    document.addEventListener(\"DOMContentLoaded\", function () {\n      showButtonBasedOnPermission();\n    });\n    \n    //interval count\n    function showButtonBasedOnPermission() {\n      var intervalCount = 0;\n      var maxIntervalCount = 5;\n    \n      // Parse JSON data to check if user is logged in\n      function updateButtonVisibility() {\n        var hubMeScript = document.getElementById(\"hub-me\");\n        var jsonData = JSON.parse(hubMeScript.dataset.json);\n    \n        // If the user is not logged in, hide the button\n        if (jsonData.loggedIn === false) {\n          var styleElement = document.createElement(\"style\");\n          styleElement.innerHTML = \".suggestEdits { display: none !important; }\";\n          document.head.appendChild(styleElement);\n        } else {\n          // If logged in, show the button\n          var styleElement = document.createElement(\"style\");\n          styleElement.innerHTML = \".suggestEdits { display: flex !important; }\";\n          document.head.appendChild(styleElement);\n        }\n      }\n    \n      // Ensure the visibility logic runs periodically\n      function runInterval() {\n        updateButtonVisibility();\n        intervalCount++;\n    \n        if (intervalCount >= maxIntervalCount) {\n          clearInterval(intervalId);\n        }\n      }\n    \n      updateButtonVisibility();\n      var intervalId = setInterval(runInterval, 800);\n    }\n  \n// === RELEASE NOTES → \"Subscribe\" CTA inserted AFTER the heading (always visible) ===\n(function subscribeAfterHeading(){\n  const CTA_ID = 'bt-subscribe-cta';\n  const TARGET_FORM = 'https://www.beyondtrust.com/forms/changelog-subscription';\n\n  function textIsReleaseNotes(s){ return /\\brelease\\s*notes\\b/i.test((s||'').trim()); }\n\n  function findReleaseNotesHeading() {\n    // Find the \u003cbutton class=\"category-toggle\"> inside the RELEASE NOTES heading\n    const headings = document.querySelectorAll('.Sidebar-headingTRQyOa2pk0gh');\n    for (const h of headings) {\n      const btn = h.querySelector('.category-toggle');\n      if (btn && textIsReleaseNotes(btn.textContent)) return h; // \u003ch2> element\n    }\n    return null;\n  }\n\n  function makeCTA() {\n    const wrap = document.createElement('div');\n    wrap.id = CTA_ID;\n    wrap.style.margin = '6px 0 4px 0';\n\n    const a = document.createElement('a');\n    a.href = TARGET_FORM;\n    a.target = '_blank';\n    a.rel = 'noopener noreferrer';\n    a.className = 'rm-Sidebar-link'; // harmless helper class\n    a.style.display = 'inline-flex';\n    a.style.alignItems = 'center';\n    a.style.background = 'rgb(255,85,0)';\n    a.style.color = '#fff';\n    a.style.borderRadius = '4px';\n    a.style.textDecoration = 'none';\n    a.style.fontSize = '13px';\n    a.style.lineHeight = '1.2';\n    a.style.padding = '5px 10px';\n    a.style.width = 'fit-content';\n\n    const img = document.createElement('img');\n    img.src = 'https://files.readme.io/a0e5f804a206d7d388df2048f6003590f35a8e6a4b504c802b4f1adb5457b23c-email-white.svg';\n    img.alt = 'Email';\n    img.style.width = '16px';\n    img.style.height = '16px';\n    img.style.marginRight = '6px';\n\n    const labelWrap = document.createElement('span');\n    labelWrap.className = 'Sidebar-link-textLuTE1ySm4Kqn';\n    const label = document.createElement('span');\n    label.className = 'Sidebar-link-text_label1gCT_uPnx7Gu';\n    label.textContent = 'Subscribe';\n\n    labelWrap.appendChild(label);\n    a.appendChild(img);\n    a.appendChild(labelWrap);\n    wrap.appendChild(a);\n    return wrap;\n  }\n\n  function inject() {\n    if (document.getElementById(CTA_ID)) return true; // already present\n    const h2 = findReleaseNotesHeading();\n    if (!h2) return false;\n\n    // Insert CTA immediately AFTER the \u003ch2> (so it stays visible even when the \u003cul> is collapsed)\n    h2.insertAdjacentElement('afterend', makeCTA());\n    console.log('[SubscribeCTA] inserted after RELEASE NOTES heading');\n    return true;\n  }\n\n  function schedule() {\n    let tries = 0, max = 20;\n    const t = setInterval(() => { if (inject() || ++tries >= max) clearInterval(t); }, 150);\n  }\n\n  // Initial load\n  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {\n    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', schedule);\n  } else {\n    schedule();\n  }\n\n  // ReadMe SPA navigations\n  if (window.jQuery) {\n    try { jQuery(window).on('pageLoad', schedule); } catch {}\n  }\n\n  // React to late mounts/rerenders (idempotent via #bt-subscribe-cta)\n  const mo = new MutationObserver(() => inject());\n  mo.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });\n})();\n\n/////////////////////////////////////\n//// Rename Entitle API elements ////\n/////////////////////////////////////\n\ndocument.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {\n  if (!window.location.pathname.includes('/entitle/reference/')) return;\n\n  // Helper: replace \"URL\" → \"Region\" for API headers\n  function fixApiHeaders() {\n    document.querySelectorAll('[class*=\"APISectionHeader-heading\"]').forEach(h => {\n      if (h.textContent.trim() === 'URL') {\n        h.textContent = 'Region';\n        // mark as handled so we don't redo it unnecessarily\n        h.setAttribute('data-region-fixed', '1');\n      }\n    });\n  }\n\n  // Run once initially\n  fixApiHeaders();\n\n  // Watch for mutations to keep the change persistent\n  const observer = new MutationObserver(mutations => {\n    for (const mutation of mutations) {\n      // Only check added or modified nodes\n      if (mutation.type === 'childList' || mutation.type === 'characterData') {\n        fixApiHeaders();\n        document.querySelectorAll('[data-tippy-root] .Menu-Header').forEach(header => {\n          if (header.textContent.trim() === 'Servers') {\n            header.textContent = 'Region';\n          }\n        });\n      }\n    }\n  });\n\n  // Observe the body so we catch any updates\n  observer.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true, characterData: true });\n});\n\n////////////////////////////////////////\n//// Expand/collapse all accordions ////\n////////////////////////////////////////\n\nfunction getDetails() {\n  return Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('details'));\n}\n\nfunction positionExpandButton(btn) {\n/*  const allButtons = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button'))\n    .filter(el => el !== btn && el.offsetParent !== null);\n\n  const rightZone = window.innerWidth - 120;\n\n  const nearbyButtons = allButtons.filter(el => {\n    const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();\n    return rect.right >= rightZone && rect.width > 0 && rect.height > 0;\n  });\n\n  if (!nearbyButtons.length) {\n    btn.style.bottom = '20px';\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const topmostButtonRect = nearbyButtons.reduce((top, el) => {\n    const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();\n    return rect.top \u003c top.top ? rect : top;\n  }, nearbyButtons[0].getBoundingClientRect());\n\n  const gap = 10;\n  const bottomValue = window.innerHeight - topmostButtonRect.top + gap;*/\n/*  btn.style.bottom = `${bottomValue}px`; This does not work. It's looking in the wrong place for the other buttons.*/\n}\n\nfunction createButton() {\n  if (document.querySelector('[data-expand-all]')) return;\n\n  const btn = document.createElement('button');\n  btn.dataset.expandAll = 'true';\n  btn.textContent = '⤢ Expand All';\n  btn.classList.add('expand-all-btn');\n\n  btn.addEventListener('click', () => {\n    const details = getDetails();\n    if (!details.length) return;\n\n    const allOpen = details.every(el => el.open);\n\n    details.forEach(el => {\n      el.open = !allOpen;\n    });\n\n    btn.textContent = allOpen ? '⤢ Expand All' : '⤡ Collapse All';\n  });\n\n  document.body.appendChild(btn);\n\n  positionExpandButton(btn);\n  window.addEventListener('resize', () => positionExpandButton(btn));\n}\n\nfunction initExpandButton() {\n  const details = getDetails();\n\n  if (details.length && !document.querySelector('[data-expand-all]')) {\n    createButton();\n  }\n}\n\ndocument.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initExpandButton);\nwindow.addEventListener('load', initExpandButton);\nsetTimeout(initExpandButton, 500);\nsetTimeout(initExpandButton, 1000);","html_promo":"","html_body":"","html_footer":"\u003cdiv style=\"background-color: #253746; color: white; padding: 10px 40px;font-size:10px\">\n  \u003cp>©2003-2026 BeyondTrust Corporation. window.liveSettings = {\n    api_key: \"f76a245bb0664046912f57446af41884\",\n    detectlang: true\n  };\n\u003c/script>\n\u003cscript src=\"https://cdn.transifex.com/live.js\">\u003c/script>\n\u003cscript>\n  window.addEventListener(\"load\", function () {\n    console.log(\"Transifex object:\", window.Transifex);\n    console.log(\"Transifex live:\", window.Transifex && window.Transifex.live);\n  });\n\u003c/script>\n\n\n\u003cscript>\n(function() {\n  // Adjust this regex to match ONLY the changelog pages you want blocked\n  var changelogRegex = /\\/changelog$/i;\n\n  if (changelogRegex.test(window.location.pathname)) {\n    var meta = document.createElement('meta');\n    meta.name = \"robots\";\n    meta.content = \"noindex, follow\"; // or \"noindex, nofollow\" if you prefer\n    document.head.appendChild(meta);\n  }\n})();\n\u003c/script>\n\n\n\u003cscript>\n;(function(){\n  // only activate on pages with \"release-notes\" in the URL\n  if (!window.location.href.includes('release-notes')) return;\n\n  let pause = false;\n  const observer = new MutationObserver(records => {\n    for (const rec of records) {\n      for (const node of rec.addedNodes) {\n        if (\n          node.tagName === 'SCRIPT' &&\n          !node.hasAttribute('src') &&\n          node.id !== 'hub-me'\n        ) {\n          // Start pausing when we hit \u003cscript id=\"customJS\">, and keep pausing thereafter\n          if (node.id === 'customJS' || pause) {\n            pause = true;\n            node.setAttribute('type', 'text/plain');\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    }\n  });\n\n  // Begin observing all new nodes\n  observer.observe(document.documentElement, {\n    childList: true,\n    subtree: true\n  });\n\n  // When the page is fully loaded (hydration done), restore & execute\n  window.addEventListener('load', () => {\n    observer.disconnect();\n    const held = document.querySelectorAll('script[type=\"text/plain\"]');\n    for (const oldScript of held) {\n      const s = document.createElement('script');\n      // copy all attrs except type\n      for (const {name, value} of oldScript.attributes) {\n        if (name !== 'type') s.setAttribute(name, value);\n      }\n      s.text = oldScript.textContent;\n      oldScript.parentNode.replaceChild(s, oldScript);\n    }\n  });\n})();\n\u003c/script>\n\n\n\u003clink rel=\"preconnect\" href=\"https://fonts.googleapis.com\">\n\u003clink rel=\"preconnect\" href=\"https://fonts.gstatic.com\"   TitleForInt: \"U-Series Appliance\",\n      TitleForProd: \"VMware\",\n      html: \"https://docs.beyondtrust.com/bips/docs/u-series-getting-started#deploy-the-virtual-machine-into-vmware-using-vsphere-client\"\n    },\n    {\n      btProds: \"U-Series Appliance\",\n      extInts: \"https://docs.beyondtrust.com/bips/docs/u-series-getting-started#import-the-virtual-machine-into-microsoft-hyper-v-using-hyper-v-manager\"\n    },\n    {\n      btProds: \"U-Series Appliance\",\n \"https://docs.beyondtrust.com/bips/docs/u-series-deployment-and-failover-guide#u-series-appliance-with-vmotion\"\n    },\n    {\n      btProds: \"U-Series Appliance\",\n      extInts: \"Nutanix\",\n
