\"https://docs.beyondtrust.com/bips/docs/u-series-deployment-and-failover-guide#u-series-appliance-with-vmotion\"\n    },\n    {\n      btProds: \"U-Series Appliance\",\n      extInts: \"Nutanix\",\n      TitleForInt: \"U-Series Appliance\",\n      TitleForProd: \"Nutanix\",\n      html: \"https://docs.beyondtrust.com/bips/docs/u-series-getting-started#import-the-virtual-machine-into-nutanix-prism-central\"\n    },\n  ];\n\n/***************************************************************\n * 2) Build the \"Product\" view (one collapsible per product),\n *    with sub-headings for each integration.\n ***************************************************************/\nfunction buildProductView(rows) {\n  const exploded = [];\n  rows.forEach((r) => {\n    const products = r.btProds.split(\";\").map((s) => s.trim()).filter(Boolean);\n    const integrations = r.extInts.split(\";\").map((s) => s.trim()).filter(Boolean);\n    if (!integrations.length) integrations.push(\"BeyondTrust\"); // if extInts is empty\n\n    products.forEach((p) => {\n      integrations.forEach((i) => {\n        exploded.push({\n          product: p,\n          integration: i,\n          linkText: `${r.TitleForProd}`,\n          url: r.html,\n        });\n      });\n    });\n  });\n\n  const productMap = {};\n  exploded.forEach((item) => {\n    if (!productMap[item.product]) {\n      productMap[item.product] = {};\n    }\n    if (!productMap[item.product][item.integration]) {\n      productMap[item.product][item.integration] = [];\n    }\n    productMap[item.product][item.integration].push({\n      text: item.linkText,\n      url: item.url,\n    });\n  });\n\n  const finalArray = [];\n  Object.keys(productMap)\n    .sort((a, b) => a.localeCompare(b, undefined, { sensitivity: 'base' }))\n    .forEach((prodName) => {\n      const subObj = productMap[prodName];\n      const subGroups = [];\n      Object.keys(subObj)\n        .sort((a, b) => a.localeCompare(b, undefined, { sensitivity: 'base' }))\n        .forEach((intName) => {\n          subGroups.push({\n            subTitle: intName,\n            links: subObj[intName],\n          });\n        });\n      finalArray.push({\n        title: prodName,\n        subGroups,\n      });\n    });\n  return finalArray;\n}\n\n/***************************************************************\n * 3) Build the \"Integration\" view (one collapsible per vendor),\n *    with sub-headings for each product.\n ***************************************************************/\nfunction buildIntegrationView(rows) {\n  const exploded = [];\n  rows.forEach((r) => {\n    const products = r.btProds.split(\";\").map((s) => s.trim()).filter(Boolean);\n    const integrations = r.extInts.split(\";\").map((s) => s.trim()).filter(Boolean);\n    // if (!products.length) products.push(\"Other\");\n    // if (!integrations.length) integrations.push(\"Other\");\n\n    integrations.forEach((i) => {\n      products.forEach((p) => {\n        exploded.push({\n          integration: i,\n          product: p,\n          linkText: `${r.TitleForInt}`,\n          url: r.html,\n        });\n      });\n    });\n  });\n\n  const integrationMap = {};\n  exploded.forEach((item) => {\n    if (!integrationMap[item.integration]) {\n      integrationMap[item.integration] = {};\n    }\n    if (!integrationMap[item.integration][item.product]) {\n      integrationMap[item.integration][item.product] = [];\n    }\n    integrationMap[item.integration][item.product].push({\n      text: item.linkText,\n      url: item.url,\n    });\n  });\n\n  const finalArray = [];\n  Object.keys(integrationMap)\n    .sort((a, b) => a.localeCompare(b, undefined, { sensitivity: 'base' }))\n    .forEach((intName) => {\n      const subObj = integrationMap[intName];\n      const subGroups = [];\n      Object.keys(subObj)\n        .sort((a, b) => a.localeCompare(b, undefined, { sensitivity: 'base' }))\n        .forEach((prodName) => {\n          subGroups.push({\n            subTitle: prodName,\n            links: subObj[prodName],\n          });\n        });\n      finalArray.push({\n        title: intName,\n        subGroups,\n      });\n    });\n  return finalArray;\n}\n\n/***************************************************************\n * 4) Actually build the arrays for both views\n ***************************************************************/\nconst productViewData = buildProductView(masterRows);\nconst integrationViewData = buildIntegrationView(masterRows);\n\nconst linksData = {\n  Product: productViewData,\n  Integration: integrationViewData,\n};\n\n/***************************************************************\n * HELPER: createProductIcon(productName) \n *         => unique image URLs per product \n ***************************************************************/\nfunction createProductIcon(productName) {\n  // We now point EVERY product to the same icon URL:\n  const iconMap = {\n  \"AD Bridge\": \"https://files.readme.io/9255f2e197d7265561ad4c717b7aeffc50add5fc185984902033bb58817b0409-AD-Bridge1.svg\",\n  \"Password Safe\": \"https://files.readme.io/ccc53a2597971a3ee4980985ad6b6f1ff0e98160df9e3bc57b77ed4c24d60c11-BeyondInsight-Password-Safe1.svg\",\n  \"BeyondInsight for Unix and Linux\": \"https://files.readme.io/ccc53a2597971a3ee4980985ad6b6f1ff0e98160df9e3bc57b77ed4c24d60c11-BeyondInsight-Password-Safe1.svg\",\n  \"Endpoint Privilege Management for Linux Cloud\": \"https://files.readme.io/1563cef8d1a5c62d69aa388315b79f6f05c6aaf93688aed92c14113027a9e2c9-Endpoint-Privilege-Management-Unix-Linux1.svg\",\n  \"Endpoint Privilege Management for Unix and Linux\": \"https://files.readme.io/1563cef8d1a5c62d69aa388315b79f6f05c6aaf93688aed92c14113027a9e2c9-Endpoint-Privilege-Management-Unix-Linux1.svg\",\n  \"Endpoint Privilege Management for Windows and Mac\": \"https://files.readme.io/fb95b93cb021aeca6de399782ef6ea66e77b77edd50dc2a710b186ea28c99569-Endpoint_Privilege_Management_for_Windows_and_Mac1.svg\",\n  \"Entitle\": \"https://files.readme.io/f13da16df2349d0322be0145bfecbc3194b0d0d7dd2bed21fc7942094866d27c-Entitle1.svg\",\n  \"Identity Security Insights\": \"https://files.readme.io/dd0d350e4f32f283f2e195466cd9240b8078143aba0a807f71b16b446344e7cf-Identity-Security-Insights1.svg\",\n  \"Privileged Remote Access\": \"https://files.readme.io/57a46b110a43bf7451cd30b4aaefdfaf577ec507e2af430803773571e1ac6c56-Privileged-Remote-Access1.svg\",\n  \"Remote Support\": \"https://files.readme.io/6aec6d7fe896768d5eae2ddea2860e01035b2e5fe4766546715073c7bd85c293-Remote-Support1.svg\",\n  \"U-Series Appliance\": \"https://files.readme.io/ccc53a2597971a3ee4980985ad6b6f1ff0e98160df9e3bc57b77ed4c24d60c11-BeyondInsight-Password-Safe1.svg\",\n  };\n\n  // If productName isn't in the map, use the same fallback icon\n  const iconURL =\n    iconMap[productName] ||\n    \"https://files.readme.io/f3216e68f9ef514510c30923c389571662377c1983b5bd2dd202a79696c7f385-prod0.svg\";\n\n  const img = document.createElement(\"img\");\n  img.src = iconURL;\n  img.alt = productName + \" icon\";\n  img.width = 40;\n  img.height = 40;\n  // margin on the right so there's space between icon and text\n  img.style.marginRight = \"10px\";\n\n  return img;\n}\n\n/***************************************************************\n * 5) Render the collapsibles\n *    For each item => one collapsible => inside are sub-headings\n ***************************************************************/\nfunction populateCategories() {\n  const categoryList = document.getElementById(\"categoryList\");\n\n  Object.keys(linksData).forEach((categoryType) => {\n    // categoryType = \"Product\" or \"Integration\"\n    linksData[categoryType]\n    .sort((a, b) => a.title.toLowerCase().localeCompare(b.title.toLowerCase())) // Case-insensitive sorting\n    .forEach((groupObj) => {\n      // groupObj = { title: \"...\", subGroups: [...] }\n\n      // Outer div (one collapsible per groupObj)\n      const categoryDiv = document.createElement(\"div\");\n      categoryDiv.classList.add(\"category\");\n      categoryDiv.setAttribute(\"data-category\", categoryType);\n      categoryDiv.style.display = \"none\"; // hidden by default\n\n      // Collapsible header\n      const header = document.createElement(\"div\");\n      header.classList.add(\"category-header\");\n      header.onclick = () => toggleCategory(header);\n\n      const h3 = document.createElement(\"h3\");\n\n      // If it's the Product category, add the product icon first.\n      if (categoryType === \"Product\") {\n        const productIcon = createProductIcon(groupObj.title);\n        h3.appendChild(productIcon);\n      }\n\n      // Then append the actual product / integration title\n      h3.appendChild(document.createTextNode(groupObj.title));\n\t  \n\t  // Create a UID for each header\n\t  const anchorId = groupObj.title.toLowerCase().replace(/\\s+/g, \"-\");\n\t  h3.id = anchorId;\n\n      const arrow = document.createElement(\"span\");\n      arrow.classList.add(\"arrow\", \"fa-solid\", \"fa-caret-down\"); // initial down arrow\n\n      header.appendChild(h3);\n      header.appendChild(arrow);\n      categoryDiv.appendChild(header);\n\n      // Collapsible content\n      const linkList = document.createElement(\"div\");\n      linkList.classList.add(\"link-list\");\n      linkList.style.display = \"none\"; // collapsed by default\n\n      const subHeadingsContainer = document.createElement(\"div\");\n      subHeadingsContainer.classList.add(\"sub-headings-container\");\n\n      groupObj.subGroups.forEach((subG) => {\n        // Create a container for the subheading and links\n        const subHeadingContainer = document.createElement(\"div\");\n        subHeadingContainer.classList.add(\"sub-heading-container\");\n\n        const subHeading = document.createElement(\"div\");\n        subHeading.classList.add(\"sub-heading\");\n        subHeading.textContent = subG.subTitle;\n\n        const ul = document.createElement(\"ul\");\n        subG.links.sort((a, b) => a.text.localeCompare(b.text)).forEach((lnk) => {\n          const li = document.createElement(\"li\");\n          const a = document.createElement(\"a\");\n          a.href = lnk.url;\n          a.textContent = lnk.text;\n          li.appendChild(a);\n          ul.appendChild(li);\n        });\n\n        // Append the subheading and its links\n        subHeadingContainer.appendChild(subHeading);\n        subHeadingContainer.appendChild(ul);\n\n        // Append to the sub-headings container\n        subHeadingsContainer.appendChild(subHeadingContainer);\n      });\n\n      linkList.appendChild(subHeadingsContainer);\n      categoryDiv.appendChild(linkList);\n      categoryList.appendChild(categoryDiv);\n    });\n  });\n}\n\n/***************************************************************\n * 6) Filter function: show either \"Product\" or \"Integration\"\n ***************************************************************/\nwindow.filterByCategory = function (category) {\n  toggleActiveButton(category); // Toggle the active button\n\n  const categories = document.querySelectorAll(\".category\");\n  categories.forEach((cat) => {\n    cat.style.display = cat.dataset.category === category ? \"block\" : \"none\";\n  });\n};\n\n/***************************************************************\n * 7) Toggle active state on buttons\n ***************************************************************/\nfunction toggleActiveButton(category) {\n  const productButton = document.querySelector('.filter-button[data-category=\"Product\"]');\n  const integrationButton = document.querySelector('.filter-button[data-category=\"Integration\"]');\n\n  if (category === \"Product\") {\n    productButton.classList.add(\"active\");\n    integrationButton.classList.remove(\"active\");\n  } else if (category === \"Integration\") {\n    integrationButton.classList.add(\"active\");\n    productButton.classList.remove(\"active\");\n  }\n}\n\n/***************************************************************\n * 8) Toggle collapsible sections\n ***************************************************************/\n window.toggleCategory = function(headerElement) {\n    const categoryDiv = headerElement.parentElement; // e.g. the \".category\" container\n    const linkList = headerElement.nextElementSibling;\n    const arrow = headerElement.querySelector(\".arrow\");\n  \n    if (!linkList || !arrow) return;\n  \n    const isCollapsed = (linkList.style.display === \"none\" || linkList.style.display === \"\");\n    linkList.style.display = isCollapsed ? \"block\" : \"none\";\n  \n    // Add or remove the \"open\" class\n    if (isCollapsed) {\n      categoryDiv.classList.add(\"open\");\n      arrow.classList.remove(\"fa-caret-down\");\n      arrow.classList.add(\"fa-caret-up\");\n    } else {\n      categoryDiv.classList.remove(\"open\");\n      arrow.classList.remove(\"fa-caret-up\");\n      arrow.classList.add(\"fa-caret-down\");\n    }\n  };\n  \n\n/***************************************************************\n * 9 - MOVED TO JS\n ***************************************************************/\n\n\u003c/script>","html_footer_meta":"\u003cscript>\n(function() {\n  // Function to hide any list item with specific labels\n  function hideListItemsByLabel(labelsToHide) {\n    const listItems = document.querySelectorAll('li');\n    listItems.forEach(li => {\n      const span = li.querySelector('span.Toggle-label');\n      if (span && labelsToHide.includes(span.textContent.trim())) {\n        li.style.display = \"none\";\n        console.log(`Hid \"${span.textContent.trim()}\" item.`);\n      }\n    });\n  }\n\n  // Function that processes the filters\n  function processFilters() {\n    hideListItemsByLabel([\"Legal & Privacy\", \"bt-general\"]);\n  }\n\n  // Observer that waits for the modal (#hub-search-results) to become active\n  function observeModalAndTriggerActions() {\n    const modalContainer = document.querySelector('#hub-search-results');\n    if (!modalContainer) {\n      console.log(\"Modal container not found. Ensure the correct ID is used.\");\n      return;\n    }\n    const observer = new MutationObserver(mutations => {\n      mutations.forEach(mutation => {\n        if (mutation.target.classList.contains('hub-search-results-active')) {\n          console.log(\"Modal is now visible, processing filters...\");\n          setTimeout(() => {\n            processFilters();\n          }, 500);\n        }\n      });\n    });\n    observer.observe(modalContainer, { attributes: true, attributeFilter: ['class'] });\n    console.log(\"Started observing modal for visibility changes...\");\n  }\n\n  // Execute immediately\n  observeModalAndTriggerActions();\n})();\n\u003c/script>\n\n\n\u003cscript>\ndocument.addEventListener(\"DOMContentLoaded\", function () {\n  setTimeout(() => {\n    const sections = {\n      \"adb\": \"/adb/docs/adb-release-notes\",\n      \"bips\": \"/bips/docs/bips-release-notes\",\n      \"epm-l\": \"/epm-l/docs/epm-l-release-notes\",\n      \"epm-ul-on-premises\": \"/epm-ul/docs/epm-ul-release-notes\",\n      \"epm-wm\": \"/epm-wm/docs/epm-wm-release-notes\",\n      \"insights\": \"/insights/docs/insights-release-notes\",\n      \"pra\": \"/pra/docs/pra-release-notes\",\n      \"rs\": \"/rs/docs/rs-release-notes\",\n      \"entitle\": \"/entitle/docs/entitle-release-notes\",\n    };\n\n    const currentPath = window.location.pathname;\n    const isReleaseNotePage = Object.values(sections).some(path => currentPath.startsWith(path));\n\n    if (isReleaseNotePage) {\n      const toggleButtons = document.querySelectorAll(\".category-toggle\");\n\n      if (toggleButtons.length > 0) {\n        // Close the first opened sidebar toggle if it's open\n        if (toggleButtons[0].getAttribute(\"aria-expanded\") === \"true\") {\n          toggleButtons[0].click();\n        }\n      }\n\n      // Find and click the \"RELEASE NOTES\" button\n      const releaseNotesButton = [...toggleButtons].find(button => button.textContent.trim() === \"RELEASE NOTES\");\n\n      if (releaseNotesButton) {\n        releaseNotesButton.click();\n      }\n    }\n  }, 1100);\n});\n  \n\u003c/script>\n\n\n\n\u003c!-- BeyondTrust Print Buttons (PUBLIC MODE) v34 -->\n\n\u003c!-- Preload BeyondTrust PDF header (used inside the print iframe) -->\n\u003cimg\n  id=\"pdf-header-img\"\n  src=\"https://files.readme.io/19f6eb0e81fea9d5108fcd03c772c5a6e3ded41c8256dca62f9dd11dbbd76753-bt_PDF.png\"\n  alt=\"PDF Header Preload\"\n  style=\"visibility:hidden; width:1px; height:100px; position:absolute; top:0; left:0;\"\n/>\n\u003c!-- Fixes vs v33:\n  1) Stronger sanitization: removes hidden/display:none/visibility:hidden so captured DOM doesn't print blank.\n  2) More reliable capture root: prefers RDMD markdown node; falls back carefully.\n  3) Print timing: waits for stylesheets + fonts + images inside the print iframe before calling print().\n  4) Keeps print iframe alive longer so Chrome doesn't snapshot a half-rendered doc.\n  5) Adds per-page console logs for captured lengths so you can see which pages are empty.\n-->\n\n\u003cstyle>\n  #btPrintPageBtn, #btPrintSectionBtn {\n    position: fixed;\n    right: 10px;\n    padding: 10px 14px;\n    font-size: 14px;\n    font-weight: 600;\n    color: #fff;\n    border: none;\n    border-radius: 4px;\n    cursor: pointer;\n    box-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,.15);\n    display: inline-flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 6px;\n    z-index: 10000;\n  }\n  #btPrintPageBtn { bottom: 10px; background: #ff5500; }\n  #btPrintPageBtn:hover { background: #ff6b21; }\n  #btPrintSectionBtn { background: #27364a; bottom: 52px; }\n  #btPrintSectionBtn:hover { background: #304457; }\n\n.btPrintOverlay{ position:fixed; inset:0; background:rgba(0,0,0,.4); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; z-index:10050; }\n  .btPrintModal{ width:640px; max-width:92vw; background:#fff; border-radius:10px; box-shadow:0 12px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.25); padding:16px; font-family:system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif; }\n  .btPrintModal h3{ margin:0 0 10px; font-size:15px; line-height:1.3; }\n  .btPrintProgress{ height:8px; background:#e5e7eb; border-radius:999px; overflow:hidden; margin-top:8px; }\n  .btPrintBar{ height:100%; width:0%; background:#253746; transition:width .2s ease; }\n  .btPrintRow{ display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; margin-top:8px; }\n  .btPrintSpin{ width:16px; height:16px; border:2px solid #e5e7eb; border-top-color:#253746; border-radius:50%; animation:btSpin .8s linear infinite; }\n  .btPrintText{ font-size:12.5px; color:#111827; font-weight:600; }\n  .btPrintSub{ font-size:12px; color:#6b7280; overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis; white-space:nowrap; max-width:100%; }\n  .btPrintActions{ display:flex; justify-content:flex-end; gap:8px; margin-top:10px; flex-wrap:wrap; }\n  .btBtn{ border-radius:6px; font-size:12.5px; padding:6px 10px; cursor:pointer; border:1px solid #e5e7eb; background:#f3f4f6; }\n  .btBtn:hover{ background:#e5e7eb; }\n  .btBtnPrimary{ background:#27364a; color:#fff; border-color:#27364a; }\n  .btBtnPrimary:hover{ background:#364a62; }\n  .btBtn[disabled]{ opacity:.55; cursor:not-allowed; }\n  @keyframes btSpin{from{transform:rotate(0)}to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}\n  @media print{ #btPrintPageBtn,#btPrintSectionBtn { display:none !important; } }\n\n  .btPickerWrap{ max-height:54vh; overflow:auto; border:1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius:8px; padding:8px; }\n  .btPickerRow{ display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; padding:8px 6px; border-radius:6px; }\n  .btPickerRow:hover{ background:#f7f8fa69; }\n  .btPickerTitle{ flex:1; font-size:13px; }\n  .btPickerCount{ font-size:12px; opacity:.7; }\n  .btPickerTop{ display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; margin-bottom:8px; gap:8px; }\n  .btPickerTop .btHint{ font-size:12px; opacity:.75; }\n  .btPickerTop .btBulk{ display:flex; gap:8px; }\n  .btPickerEmpty{ padding:8px; font-size:13px; opacity:.75; }\n\u003c/style>\n\n\u003cscript>\n;(() => {\n  'use strict';\n  const BT_IN_IFRAME = (window.top !== window.self);\n  // Allow Print Page everywhere (including editor preview iframes).\n  // Print Section(s) will be limited to top-level docs pages only.\n\n  const PAGE_BTN_ID   = 'btPrintPageBtn';\n  const CAT_BTN_ID    = 'btPrintSectionBtn';\n  const CONTAINER_SEL = '.rm-Guides, .rm-Changelog';\n\n  const HARD_LIMIT     = 999;\n  const CONFIRM_LIMIT  = 100;\n\n  // Capture tuning\n  const PER_PAGE_TIMEOUT_MS = 80000;\n  const POLL_MS             = 170;\n  const STABLE_IDLE_MS      = 650;\n  const MIN_LEN             = 240;\n\n  // Capture iframe size\n  const CAP_W = 1400;\n  const CAP_H = 2400;\n\n  // Print readiness\n  const PRINT_READY_TIMEOUT_MS = 12000;\n\n  // Branding\n  const BRAND_LOGO_URL = 'https://files.readme.io/19f6eb0e81fea9d5108fcd03c772c5a6e';\n\n  // Debug always on\n  const NS = '[BT Print v34]';\n  const t = () => new Date().toISOString().split('T')[1].replace('Z','');\n  const log  = (...a) => console.log(`${NS} ${t()}`, ...a);\n  const warn = (...a) => console.warn(`${NS} ${t()}`, ...a);\n\n  const text = (el) => (el ? (el.textContent || '').replace(/\\s+/g,' ').trim() : '');\n  const esc  = (s) => String(s ?? '')\n    .replaceAll('&','&amp;').replaceAll('\u003c','&lt;').replaceAll('>','&gt;')\n    .replaceAll('\"','&quot;').replaceAll(\"'\",\"&#39;\");\n  const leftPipe = (s) => String(s || '').split('|')[0].trim();\n  const lc = (s) => leftPipe(String(s || '')).toLowerCase();\n  const sleep = (ms) => new Promise(res => setTimeout(res, ms));\n\n  const getProjectName = () =>\n    document.querySelector('meta[property=\"og:site_name\"]')?.content?.trim() || '';\n\n  const getContainer = () => document.querySelector(CONTAINER_SEL);\n\n  // Sidebar helpers\n  const getSidebar = () =>\n    document.getElementById('hub-sidebar') ||\n    document.querySelector('.rm-Sidebar.hub-sidebar') ||\n    document.querySelector('.rm-Sidebar');\n\n  const getSectionTitle = (section) => {\n    const h = section.querySelector('.rm-Sidebar-heading, h2');\n    const tEl = h?.querySelector?.('.category-toggle');\n    return text(tEl || h) || 'Untitled section';\n  };\n\n  const getLinkLabel = (a) =>\n    (text(a) || a.getAttribute('aria-label') || a.getAttribute('title') || '').trim();\n\n  const collectDocEntriesFromSection = (section) => {\n    const anchors = Array.from(section.querySelectorAll('a.rm-Sidebar-link[href], a[href*=\"/docs/\"]'));\n    const byPath = new Map();\n\n    const isSubpageAnchor = (a) =>\n      a.classList.contains('subpage') ||\n      a.closest('.subpages') ||\n      a.classList.contains('childless') ||\n      a.closest('ul.subpages');\n\n    for (const a of anchors) {\n      const href = a.getAttribute('href');\n      if (!href) continue;\n\n      // Prefer the link label (child labels like \"AWS\") over generic parent labels (like \"Tutorials\")\n      const label = getLinkLabel(a);\n\n      try {\n        const u = new URL(href, location.href);\n        if (u.origin !== location.origin) continue;\n        if (!/\\/docs\\//.test(u.pathname)) continue;\n\n        const path = u.pathname;\n        const isSub = !!isSubpageAnchor(a);\n\n        const existing = byPath.get(path);\n        if (!existing) {\n          byPath.set(path, { href: u.href, path, expectedTitle: label || path.split('/').pop(), isSub });\n          continue;\n        }\n\n        // If we already saw this path, upgrade the expectedTitle if this is a \"more specific\" link.\n        // This fixes cases where a parent node points to the same page as a child node.\n        const existingTitle = (existing.expectedTitle || '').trim();\n        const incomingTitle = (label || '').trim();\n\n        const incomingLooksUseful = incomingTitle && incomingTitle.length >= 2 && incomingTitle !== existingTitle;\n        const existingLooksGeneric =\n          !existingTitle ||\n          existingTitle.toLowerCase() === 'tutorials' ||  // common parent label\n          existingTitle.toLowerCase() === existing.path.split('/').pop()?.toLowerCase();\n\n        if ((isSub && !existing.isSub && incomingLooksUseful) || (existingLooksGeneric && incomingLooksUseful)) {\n          byPath.set(path, { href: u.href, path, expectedTitle: incomingTitle, isSub });\n        }\n      } catch {}\n    }\n\n    return Array.from(byPath.values());\n  };\n\n  const getCategories = () => {\n    const sb = getSidebar();\n    const sections = sb ? Array.from(sb.querySelectorAll('.rm-Sidebar-section')) : [];\n    return sections\n      .map(sec => ({ title: getSectionTitle(sec), entries: collectDocEntriesFromSection(sec) }))\n      .filter(r => r.entries.length);\n  };\n\n  // Overlay\n  const openOverlay = (total, label) => {\n    const prevOverflow = document.documentElement.style.overflow;\n    document.documentElement.style.overflow = 'hidden';\n\n    const overlay = document.createElement('div');\n    overlay.className = 'btPrintOverlay';\n    overlay.innerHTML = `\n      \u003cdiv class=\"btPrintModal\">\n        \u003ch3>Preparing print view\u003c/h3>\n        \u003cdiv class=\"btPrintProgress\">\u003cdiv class=\"btPrintBar\" id=\"btPrintBar\">\u003c/div>\u003c/div>\n        \u003cdiv class=\"btPrintRow\">\n          \u003cdiv class=\"btPrintSpin\">\u003c/div>\n          \u003cdiv>\n            \u003cdiv class=\"btPrintText\" id=\"btPrintText\">0 / ${total} pages\u003c/div>\n            \u003cdiv class=\"btPrintSub\" id=\"btPrintSub\">${esc(label || '')}\u003c/div>\n          \u003c/div>\n        \u003c/div>\n        \u003cdiv class=\"btPrintActions\">\n          \u003cbutton type=\"button\" class=\"btBtn\" id=\"btPrintCancel\">Cancel\u003c/button>\n          \u003cbutton type=\"button\" class=\"btBtn btBtnPrimary\" id=\"btPrintNow\" disabled>Print now\u003c/button>\n        \u003c/div>\n        \u003cdiv style=\"margin-top:8px;font-size:12px;opacity:.75;\">\n          If the print dialog doesn’t open automatically, click \u003cstrong>Print now\u003c/strong>.\n        \u003c/div>\n      \u003c/div>`;\n    document.body.appendChild(overlay);\n\n    let canceled = false;\n    let onPrint = null;\n\n    const $ = (sel) => overlay.querySelector(sel);\n    $('#btPrintCancel').onclick = () => {\n      canceled = true;\n      try { $('#btPrintSub').textContent = 'Canceling…'; } catch {}\n      // Close immediately so the UI never feels stuck.\n      try { overlay.remove(); } catch {}\n      try { document.documentElement.style.overflow = prevOverflow; } catch {}\n    };\n    $('#btPrintNow').onclick = () => { if (onPrint) onPrint(); };\n\n    return {\n      isCanceled: () => canceled,\n      update: (done, total, sub) => {\n        const pct = total ? Math.round((done / total) * 100) : 0;\n        $('#btPrintBar').style.width = pct + '%';\n        $('#btPrintText').textContent = `${done} / ${total} pages`;\n        if (sub) $('#btPrintSub').textContent = sub;\n      },\n      set: (sub) => { $('#btPrintSub').textContent = sub; },\n      enablePrint: (fn) => {\n        onPrint = typeof fn === 'function' ? fn : null;\n        $('#btPrintNow').disabled = !onPrint;\n      },\n      close: () => {\n        try { overlay.remove(); } catch {}\n        document.documentElement.style.overflow = prevOverflow;\n      }\n    };\n  };\n\n  // Picker\n  async function openCategoryPicker(cats) {\n    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {\n      const overlay = document.createElement('div');\n      overlay.className = 'btPrintOverlay';\n      overlay.setAttribute('role', 'dialog');\n      overlay.setAttribute('aria-modal', 'true');\n\n      const rowsHtml = cats.map((c, idx) => `\n        \u003clabel class=\"btPickerRow\" for=\"btPick_${idx}\">\n          \u003cinput id=\"btPick_${idx}\" type=\"checkbox\" class=\"btPickCb\" data-idx=\"${idx}\" />\n          \u003cdiv class=\"btPickerTitle\">${esc(c.title)}\u003c/div>\n          \u003cdiv class=\"btPickerCount\">${c.entries.length}\u003c/div>\n        \u003c/label>\n      `).join('');\n\n      overlay.innerHTML = `\n        \u003cdiv class=\"btPrintModal\" style=\"max-width:720px\">\n          \u003ch3>Select section(s) to print\u003c/h3>\n          \u003cdiv class=\"btPickerTop\">\n            \u003cdiv class=\"btHint\">Captures pages via hidden iframes, then prints in one combined job.\u003c/div>\n            \u003cdiv class=\"btBulk\">\n              \u003cbutton type=\"button\" class=\"btBtn\" id=\"btPickAll\">Select all\u003c/button>\n              \u003cbutton type=\"button\" class=\"btBtn\" id=\"btPickNone\">Clear\u003c/button>\n            \u003c/div>\n          \u003c/div>\n          \u003cdiv class=\"btPickerWrap\" tabindex=\"0\">\n            ${rowsHtml || `\u003cdiv class=\"btPickerEmpty\">No sections found.\u003c/div>`}\n          \u003c/div>\n          \u003cdiv class=\"btPrintActions\">\n            \u003cbutton type=\"button\" class=\"btBtn\" id=\"btPickCancel\">Cancel\u003c/button>\n            \u003cbutton type=\"button\" class=\"btBtn btBtnPrimary\" id=\"btPickContinue\" disabled>Continue\u003c/button>\n          \u003c/div>\n        \u003c/div>\n      `;\n\n      document.body.appendChild(overlay);\n      const $ = (sel) => overlay.querySelector(sel);\n      const $$ = (sel) => Array.from(overlay.querySelectorAll(sel));\n      const btnAll = $('#btPickAll');\n      const btnNone = $('#btPickNone');\n      const btnCancel = $('#btPickCancel');\n      const btnGo = $('#btPickContinue');\n      const checkboxes = $$('.btPickCb');\n\n      const updateButtonState = () => { btnGo.disabled = !checkboxes.some(cb => cb.checked); };\n      const close = () => { overlay.remove(); };\n\n      btnAll.onclick = () => { checkboxes.forEach(cb => cb.checked = true); updateButtonState(); };\n      btnNone.onclick = () => { checkboxes.forEach(cb => cb.checked = false); updateButtonState(); };\n      btnCancel.onclick = () => { close(); reject(new Error('canceled')); };\n      btnGo.onclick = () => {\n        const pickedIdx = checkboxes.filter(cb => cb.checked)\n          .map(cb => Number(cb.getAttribute('data-idx')))\n          .filter(i => !Number.isNaN(i));\n        close();\n        resolve(pickedIdx.map(i => cats[i]));\n      };\n\n      checkboxes.forEach(cb => cb.addEventListener('change', updateButtonState, { passive:true }));\n      updateButtonState();\n      setTimeout(() => overlay.querySelector('.btPickerWrap')?.focus(), 0);\n    });\n  }\n\n  // Content root selection\n  function findContentRoot(doc) {\n    // Prefer RDMD directly first (most consistent)\n    const direct = doc.querySelector('.rm-Markdown[data-testid=\"RDMD\"]');\n    if (direct) return direct;\n\n    const candidates = [\n      '#content-container section.content-body .rm-Markdown[data-testid=\"RDMD\"]',\n      '#content-container section.content-body .rm-Markdown',\n      '#content-container section.content-body',\n      'article.rm-Article .rm-Markdown[data-testid=\"RDMD\"]',\n      'article.rm-Article .rm-Markdown',\n      'article.rm-Article',\n      '.rm-Markdown',\n      '#content',\n      'main'\n    ];\n    for (const sel of candidates) {\n      const el = doc.querySelector(sel);\n      if (el) return el;\n    }\n    return null;\n  }\n\n  function primaryFrom(root) {\n    if (!root) return null;\n    // If the root isn't RDMD, try to find it inside.\n    return root.matches?.('.rm-Markdown[data-testid=\"RDMD\"]') ? root :\n      root.querySelector?.('.rm-Markdown[data-testid=\"RDMD\"]') ||\n      root.querySelector?.('.rm-Markdown') ||\n      root;\n  }\n\n  function fingerprint(node) {\n    if (!node) return '';\n    const h = node.innerHTML || '';\n    return String(h.length) + ':' + h.slice(0, 140) + ':' + h.slice(-140);\n  }\n\n  function titleMatches(expectedTitle, docTitle, h1Text) {\n    const exp = lc(expectedTitle);\n    if (!exp) return true;\n    const a = lc(h1Text);\n    const b = lc(docTitle);\n    return (a && (a.includes(exp) || exp.includes(a))) || (b && (b.includes(exp) || exp.includes(b)));\n  }\n\n  // URL absolutization\n  function absolutizeUrls(node, base) {\n    const toAbs = (url) => { try { return new URL(url, base).href; } catch { return url; } };\n\n    node.querySelectorAll('img').forEach(img => {\n      const lazy = img.getAttribute('data-src') || img.getAttribute('data-lazy-src');\n      if (!img.getAttribute('src') && lazy) img.setAttribute('src', lazy);\n      const src = img.getAttribute('src');\n      if (src && !/^data:|^blob:|^https?:\\/\\//i.test(src)) img.setAttribute('src', toAbs(src));\n      img.setAttribute('referrerpolicy', 'no-referrer');\n      img.removeAttribute('loading');\n    });\n\n    node.querySelectorAll('[src]').forEach(el => {\n      const s = el.getAttribute('src');\n      if (s && !/^data:|^blob:|^https?:\\/\\//i.test(s)) el.setAttribute('src', toAbs(s));\n    });\n\n    node.querySelectorAll('[href]').forEach(el => {\n      const h = el.getAttribute('href');\n      if (h && !/^#|^mailto:|^tel:|^data:|^blob:|^https?:\\/\\//i.test(h)) el.setAttribute('href', toAbs(h));\n    });\n  }\n\n  // Strong sanitize to avoid \"blank due to hidden styles\"\n  function sanitizeNodeToHTML(node, baseUrl) {\n    const clone = node.cloneNode(true);\n\n    // Expand ALL \u003cdetails> so accordion content is included in print\n    clone.querySelectorAll('details').forEach(details => {\n      details.setAttribute('open','');\n      // Some themes hide content in a wrapper; unhide any known wrapper\n      const c = details.querySelector('.details-content');\n      if (c && c.style) {\n        c.style.removeProperty('display');\n        c.style.removeProperty('visibility');\n        c.style.removeProperty('opacity');\n        c.style.removeProperty('height');\n        c.style.removeProperty('max-height');\n      }\n    });\n    clone.querySelectorAll('.TabContent').forEach(panel => {\n      panel.removeAttribute('hidden');\n      panel.removeAttribute('aria-hidden');\n      panel.removeAttribute('data-hidden');\n      if (panel.style) {\n        panel.style.removeProperty('display');\n        panel.style.removeProperty('visibility');\n        panel.style.removeProperty('opacity');\n        panel.style.removeProperty('height');\n        panel.style.removeProperty('max-height');\n      }\n    });\n\n    // Remove scripts/iframes\n    clone.querySelectorAll('script, noscript, iframe').forEach(el => el.remove());\n\n    // Remove inline hidden styles everywhere + hidden attributes\n    const walker = document.createTreeWalker(clone, NodeFilter.SHOW_ELEMENT, null, false);\n    while (walker.nextNode()) {\n      const el = walker.currentNode;\n\n      // drop inline event handlers\n      for (const attr of Array.from(el.attributes || [])) {\n        if (/^on/i.test(attr.name)) el.removeAttribute(attr.name);\n      }\n\n      if (el.hasAttribute && el.hasAttribute('hidden')) el.removeAttribute('hidden');\n      if (el.getAttribute && el.getAttribute('aria-hidden') === 'true') el.removeAttribute('aria-hidden');\n      if (el.getAttribute && el.getAttribute('data-hidden') != null) el.removeAttribute('data-hidden');\n\n      if (el.style) {\n        const disp = (el.style.display || '').toLowerCase();\n        const vis  = (el.style.visibility || '').toLowerCase();\n        const op   = (el.style.opacity || '').toLowerCase();\n\n        if (disp === 'none') el.style.removeProperty('display');\n        if (vis === 'hidden') el.style.removeProperty('visibility');\n        if (op === '0') el.style.removeProperty('opacity');\n      }\n    }\n\n    try { absolutizeUrls(clone, baseUrl); } catch {}\n    return clone.innerHTML;\n  }\n\n  function collectCssLinks(doc) {\n    return Array.from(doc.querySelectorAll('link[rel=\"stylesheet\"][href]')).map(l => l.href).filter(Boolean);\n  }\n  function collectInlineStyles(doc) {\n    return Array.from(doc.querySelectorAll('style')).map(s => s.textContent || '').filter(Boolean);\n  }\n\n  function makeCaptureIframe() {\n    const iframe = document.createElement('iframe');\n    Object.assign(iframe.style, {\n      position:'fixed', top:'0px', left:'0px',\n      width: CAP_W + 'px', height: CAP_H + 'px',\n      opacity:'0', pointerEvents:'none', border:'0',\n      transform:'scale(0.01)', transformOrigin:'0 0',\n      zIndex:'0'\n    });\n    document.body.appendChild(iframe);\n    return iframe;\n  }\n\n  async function loadInIframe(iframe, url) {\n    return new Promise((resolve) => {\n      let done = false;\n      const finish = () => { if (done) return; done = true; resolve(true); };\n      iframe.onload = finish;\n      iframe.onerror = finish;\n      setTimeout(finish, 25000);\n      iframe.src = url;\n    });\n  }\n\n  function buildTargetUrl(entryHref, idx, useFramePreview) {\n    const u = new URL(entryHref, location.href);\n    u.searchParams.set('_cb', String(Date.now()) + '_' + String(idx));\n    if (useFramePreview) u.searchParams.set('isFramePreview', 'true');\n    else u.searchParams.delete('isFramePreview');\n    return u.href;\n  }\n\n  async function captureFromIframe(entry, idx, overlay, prevFp, useFramePreview) {\n    const target = buildTargetUrl(entry.href, idx, useFramePreview);\n    log('CAPTURE start', { idx, expectedPath: entry.path, expectedTitle: entry.expectedTitle, target, useFramePreview });\n\n    const iframe = makeCaptureIframe();\n    try {\n      await loadInIframe(iframe, target);\n\n      const start = Date.now();\n      let lastLen = 0;\n      let lastChange = Date.now();\n      let lastFp = '';\n      let lastLog = 0;\n      let scrollY = 0;\n\n      while (Date.now() - start \u003c PER_PAGE_TIMEOUT_MS) {\n        if (overlay?.isCanceled?.()) break;\n\n        let doc, win, landedPath, docTitle;\n        try {\n          win = iframe.contentWindow;\n          doc = iframe.contentDocument || win?.document;\n          landedPath = win?.location?.pathname || '';\n          docTitle = doc?.title || '';\n        } catch {\n          await sleep(POLL_MS);\n          continue;\n        }\n\n        const now = Date.now();\n        if (now - lastLog > 1400) {\n          lastLog = now;\n          log('WAIT', { idx, expectedPath: entry.path, landedPath: landedPath || 'blank', ms: now - start });\n          overlay?.set?.(`Compiling ${idx+1}: ${entry.path}`);\n        }\n\n        if (!doc || landedPath !== entry.path) { await sleep(POLL_MS); continue; }\n\n        const root = findContentRoot(doc);\n        const primary = primaryFrom(root);\n\n        const h1El = doc.querySelector('#content-head h1') || primary?.querySelector?.('h1') || doc.querySelector('h1');\n        const h1Text = text(h1El) || docTitle || '';\n        const okTitle = titleMatches(entry.expectedTitle, docTitle, h1Text);\n\n        const len = (primary?.textContent || '').replace(/\\s+/g,' ').trim().length;\n        const fp = fingerprint(primary);\n\n        if (len !== lastLen) { lastLen = len; lastChange = now; }\n        if (fp && fp !== lastFp) lastFp = fp;\n\n        // Prevent \"same page repeated\": require fingerprint different from previous capture\n        const unique = fp && fp !== prevFp;\n\n        // Nudge lazy/custom content\n        try {\n          const maxY = Math.max(doc.body?.scrollHeight || 0, doc.documentElement?.scrollHeight || 0);\n          scrollY = (scrollY + 900) % Math.max(1200, maxY);\n          win.scrollTo(0, Math.min(scrollY, maxY));\n        } catch {}\n\n        const stable = (now - lastChange) >= STABLE_IDLE_MS;\n        const okLen = len >= MIN_LEN;\n\n        if (primary && okLen && okTitle && stable && unique) {\n          const pageTitle = leftPipe(h1Text) || leftPipe(docTitle) || leftPipe(entry.expectedTitle) || 'Untitled';\n          const html = sanitizeNodeToHTML(primary, target);\n\n          log('CAPTURE ok', { idx, path: entry.path, len, htmlLen: (html||'').length, title: pageTitle, useFramePreview });\n\n          return {\n            ok: true,\n            url: target,\n            title: pageTitle,\n            html,\n            cssHrefs: collectCssLinks(doc),\n            styleTexts: collectInlineStyles(doc),\n            fp\n          };\n        }\n\n        await sleep(POLL_MS);\n      }\n\n      warn('CAPTURE failed', { idx, path: entry.path, useFramePreview });\n      return { ok:false, url: target, title:'', html:'', cssHrefs:[], styleTexts:[], fp:'' };\n    } finally {\n      try { iframe.remove(); } catch {}\n    }\n  }\n\n  async function capturePage(entry, idx, overlay, prevFp) {\n    // Prefer normal public URL first\n    let r = await captureFromIframe(entry, idx, overlay, prevFp, false);\n    if (r && r.ok && r.html && r.html.trim()) return r;\n    // Retry with frame preview\n    r = await captureFromIframe(entry, idx, overlay, prevFp, true);\n    return r;\n  }\n\n  // Print doc\n  function buildPrintDoc({ title, bodyHTML, pageCssHrefs = [], inlineStyles = [], headerTitle, headerSubtitle }) {\n    // BeyondTrust branded print template (banner header + footer)\n    const hdr = document.getElementById('pdf-header-img');\n    const hdrSrc = (hdr && hdr.src) ? hdr.src :\n      'https://files.readme.io/19f6eb0e81fea9d5108fcd03c772c5a6e3ded41c8256dca62f9dd11dbbd76753-bt_PDF.png';\n\n    const printCSS = `\n      .suggestEdits, .UpdatedAt, .NextStepsDivider, .PaginationControls, .PageThumbs,\n      .content-toc, .rm-Pagination, nav[aria-label=\"Pagination Controls\"],\n      .Banner2qY-Hhfqm_Gx, .Banner_warn2mXPeLXtaCnJ, .Banner_xs1V3kPVsh40hS { display:none !important; }\n\n      body { margin:0; margin-bottom:80px !important; font-family:Arial,sans-serif; line-height:1.6; color:#555; }\n      #print-header { position:relative; }\n      #print-header img { width:100% !important; max-height:120px !important; object-fit:cover !important; display:block !important; }\n      #bt-project-name {\n        position:absolute; top:40px; right:25px;\n        font-family:Arial,sans-serif; font-size:14px; font-weight:bold;\n        color:#fff !important; text-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.35);\n      }\n      #bt-section-name {\n        position:absolute; top:64px; right:25px;\n        font-family:Arial,sans-serif; font-size:12px; opacity:.9;\n        color:#fff !important; text-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.35);\n      }\n      #print-content { margin-top: 0 !important; padding: 20px 30px 20px !important; }\n\n      img{max-width:100% !important; height:auto; page-break-inside:avoid; }\n      h1{font-size:21px;}\n      h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6{margin:0 0 .5em;page-break-after:avoid;page-break-inside:avoid;}\n      p,table,th,td{margin:0 0 0;font-size:1em;color:#555;}\n      table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;}\n      th,td{border:1px solid #ddd;padding:8px;vertical-align:top;}\n      th{background:#f2f2f2;text-align:left;}\n\n      details.Accordion { page-break-inside: avoid; }\n      details.Accordion > summary::-webkit-details-marker { display:none; }\n      .Accordion-toggleIcon, .Accordion-toggleIcon_opened { display:none !important; }\n      .TabGroup-nav { display:none !important; }\n      .TabContent { display:block !important; visibility:visible !important; }\n\n      /* Accordion (\u003cdetails>) print styling: super light grey instead of dark */\n      details,\n      details.Accordion {\n        background: #f9fafb !important;\n        border: 1px solid #e5e7eb !important;\n        border-radius: 8px !important;\n        margin: 14px 0 !important;\n        padding: 0 !important;\n        box-shadow: none !important;\n      }\n      details > summary {\n        background: #f3f4f6 !important;\n        color: #111827 !important;\n        padding: 10px 12px !important;\n        font-weight: 600 !important;\n        border-bottom: 1px solid #e5e7eb !important;\n        list-style: none !important;\n      }\n      details > summary::-webkit-details-marker { display: none !important; }\n      details > summary i,\n      details > summary svg {\n        color: #111827 !important;\n        opacity: 1 !important;\n      }\n      details > *:not(summary) {\n        background: #f9fafb !important;\n      }\n      details .details-content {\n        background: #f9fafb !important;\n        color: #111827 !important;\n        padding: 12px !important;\n      }\n\n\n      .page-break { page-break-before:always !important; }\n\n      .bt-failed {\n        border: 1px solid #fca5a5;\n        background: #fff1f2;\n        padding: 12px;\n        border-radius: 8px;\n        margin: 16px 0;\n      }\n      .bt-failed code { font-size: 12px; }\n\n      #print-footer { width:100%; padding:10px 20px; background:#fff; border-top:1px solid #ddd; page-break-inside:avoid; }\n      #footer-links { text-align:center; font-size:12px; margin-bottom:4px; }\n      #footer-links strong { font-weight:bold; color:#555; margin:0 6px 0 0; }\n      #footer-links a { color:#ff5500; text-decoration:none; margin:0 12px; }\n      #footer-links a:hover { text-decoration:underline; }\n      #footer-legal { text-align:center; font-size:10px; color:#777; line-height:1.3; }\n      /* --- Added for v34 capture wrapper --- */\n      .btPrintPage { page-break-inside: auto !important; break-inside: auto !important; }\n      .btPageTitle { margin: 0 0 16px !important; font-size: 22px; color:#27364a; line-height:1.2; }\n      /* Ensure captured nodes aren't hidden in print */\n      #print-content [hidden], #print-content [aria-hidden=\"true\"] { display:block !important; visibility:visible !important; opacity:1 !important; }\n      #print-content * { -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; print-color-adjust: exact; }\n      /* Hide any UI junk that sneaks in */\n      #print-content .rm-Header, #print-content .rm-Footer, #print-content .rm-Sidebar, #print-content .hub-sidebar { display:none !important; }\n      /* Avoid giant empty first page margin in some browsers */\n      @page { margin: 12mm 10mm 14mm; }\n`;\n\n    const links = (pageCssHrefs || [])\n      .filter(Boolean)\n      .map(h => `\u003clink rel=\"stylesheet\" href=\"${esc(h)}\" media=\"all\">`)\n      .join('\\n');\n\n    const pn = headerTitle || '';\n    const sn = headerSubtitle || '';\n\n    const inline = (inlineStyles || [])\n      .filter(s => typeof s === 'string' && s.trim())\n      .map(s => `\u003cstyle>${s}\u003c/style>`)\n      .join('\\n');\n\n    return `\u003c!doctype html>\n\u003chtml>\n\u003chead>\n  \u003cmeta charset=\"utf-8\">\n  \u003ctitle>${esc(title || 'Print')}\u003c/title>\n  ${links}\n  \u003cstyle>${printCSS}\u003c/style>\n  ${inline}\n\u003c/head>\n\u003cbody>\n  \u003cdiv id=\"print-header\">\n    ${hdrSrc ? `\u003cimg src=\"${esc(hdrSrc)}\" alt=\"BeyondTrust PDF Header\" />` : ``}\n    \u003cdiv id=\"bt-project-name\">${esc(pn)}\u003c/div>\n    ${sn ? `\u003cdiv id=\"bt-section-name\">${esc(sn)}\u003c/div>` : ``}\n  \u003c/div>\n\n  \u003cdiv id=\"print-content\">\n    ${bodyHTML}\n  \u003c/div>\n\n  \u003cdiv id=\"print-footer\">\n    \u003cp id=\"footer-links\">\n      \u003cstrong>SALES:\u003c/strong>\n        \u003ca href=\"https://www.beyondtrust.com/contact\" target=\"_blank\">www.beyondtrust.com/contact\u003c/a>\n      \u003cstrong>SUPPORT:\u003c/strong>\n        \u003ca href=\"https://www.beyondtrust.com/support\" target=\"_blank\">www.beyondtrust.com/support\u003c/a>\n    \u003c/p>\n\n    \u003cp id=\"footer-legal\">\n      © 2025 BeyondTrust Corporation. All rights reserved. Other trademarks identified\n      on this page are owned by their respective owners. BeyondTrust is not a chartered\n      bank or trust company, or depository institution. It is not authorized to accept\n      deposits or trust accounts and is not licensed or regulated by any state or federal\n      banking authority.\n    \u003c/p>\n  \u003c/div>\n\u003c/body>\n\u003c/html>`;\n  }\n\n  function makePrintIframe() {\n    const iframe = document.createElement('iframe');\n    Object.assign(iframe.style, { position:'fixed', width:'0', height:'0', border:'0', right:'0', bottom:'0' });\n    document.body.appendChild(iframe);\n    return iframe;\n  }\n\n  async function waitForPrintReady(win, timeoutMs) {\n    const start = Date.now();\n    const doc = win.document;\n\n    // mark stylesheet links when loaded\n    try {\n      doc.querySelectorAll('link[rel=\"stylesheet\"]').forEach(l => {\n        if (!l.dataset) return;\n        l.dataset.btLoaded = '0';\n        l.onload = () => { l.dataset.btLoaded = '1'; };\n        l.onerror = () => { l.dataset.btLoaded = '1'; };\n      });\n    } catch {}\n\n    while (Date.now() - start \u003c timeoutMs) {\n      try {\n        const links = Array.from(doc.querySelectorAll('link[rel=\"stylesheet\"]'));\n        const cssOk = links.every(l => (l.sheet != null) || (l.dataset && l.dataset.btLoaded === '1'));\n\n        const imgs = Array.from(doc.images || []);\n        const imgOk = imgs.every(img => img.complete);\n\n        let fontsOk = true;\n        try {\n          if (doc.fonts && doc.fonts.status !== 'loaded') {\n            // wait for fonts.ready but don't hang forever\n            await Promise.race([doc.fonts.ready, new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 250))]);\n          }\n          fontsOk = !doc.fonts || doc.fonts.status === 'loaded';\n        } catch {}\n\n        if (doc.readyState === 'complete' && cssOk && imgOk && fontsOk) {\n          // 2 rAFs to flush layout\n          await new Promise(r => win.requestAnimationFrame(() => win.requestAnimationFrame(r)));\n          return true;\n        }\n      } catch {}\n\n      await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 180));\n    }\n    return false;\n  }\n\n  function printHtmlInHiddenIframe(html, onDone) {\n    const iframe = makePrintIframe();\n    const win = iframe.contentWindow;\n    const doc = win.document;\n\n    const cleanup = () => {\n      try { iframe.remove(); } catch {}\n      if (typeof onDone === 'function') onDone();\n    };\n\n    try {\n      doc.open();\n      doc.write(html);\n      doc.close();\n\n      (async () => {\n        const ready = await waitForPrintReady(win, PRINT_READY_TIMEOUT_MS);\n        log('PRINT ready', { ready });\n\n        try {\n          win.focus();\n          win.print();\n        } catch (e) {\n          warn('print() threw', e);\n        }\n\n        // keep iframe alive longer to avoid blank snapshot\n        setTimeout(cleanup, 12000);\n      })();\n    } catch (e) {\n      warn('write/print failed', e);\n      cleanup();\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Actions\n  async function onPrintPage() {\n    const root = findContentRoot(document) || document.querySelector('#content') || document.querySelector('.rm-Markdown') || getContainer();\n    const primary = primaryFrom(root);\n    if (!primary) { alert('Content not found.'); return; }\n\n    const h1 = document.querySelector('#content-head h1') || primary.querySelector('h1') || document.querySelector('h1');\n    const pageTitle = leftPipe(text(h1) || document.title || 'Untitled');\n    const project = getProjectName() || 'BeyondTrust';\n\n    const bodyHTML = `\u003csection class=\"btPrintPage\">\n      \u003ch1 class=\"btPageTitle\">${esc(pageTitle)}\u003c/h1>\n      ${sanitizeNodeToHTML(primary, location.href)}\n    \u003c/section>`;\n\n    const html = buildPrintDoc({\n      title: project,\n      bodyHTML,\n      pageCssHrefs: collectCssLinks(document),\n      inlineStyles: collectInlineStyles(document),\n      headerTitle: project,\n      headerSubtitle: pageTitle\n    });\n\n    printHtmlInHiddenIframe(html);\n  }\n\n  async function onPrintSection() {\n    if (BT_IN_IFRAME) { alert('Print Section(s) is disabled in preview iframes. Open the public docs page to print sections.'); return; }\n    const cats = getCategories();\n    if (!cats.length) { alert('No printable sections found (sidebar missing).'); return; }\n\n    let chosen;\n    try { chosen = await openCategoryPicker(cats); } catch { return; }\n\n    const seen = new Set();\n    const entries = [];\n    for (const c of chosen) for (const ent of c.entries) {\n      if (!seen.has(ent.path)) { seen.add(ent.path); entries.push(ent); }\n    }\n\n    if (!entries.length) return alert('No pages to print from the selected categories.');\n    if (entries.length > HARD_LIMIT) {\n      entries.length = HARD_LIMIT;\n      alert(`This selection has many pages. Limiting to the first ${HARD_LIMIT}.`);\n    } else if (entries.length > CONFIRM_LIMIT) {\n      if (!confirm(`Compile ${entries.length} pages into one print job?`)) return;\n    }\n\n    log('SECTION entries', { count: entries.length, paths: entries.map(e => e.path) });\n\n    const overlay = openOverlay(entries.length, chosen.map(c => c.title).join(', '));\n\n    const pages = [];\n    let firstCss = null;\n    let firstInline = null;\n    let done = 0;\n    let prevFp = '';\n\n    for (let i = 0; i \u003c entries.length; i++) {\n      if (overlay.isCanceled()) break;\n\n      overlay.update(done, entries.length, `Compiling ${i+1}/${entries.length}…`);\n      const p = await capturePage(entries[i], i, overlay, prevFp);\n\n      // Log captures so you can see empties\n      log('PAGE result', { idx: i, path: entries[i].path, ok: !!p?.ok, title: p?.title || '', htmlLen: (p?.html || '').length });\n\n      if (p && p.ok && p.fp) prevFp = p.fp;\n\n      if (!firstCss && p && p.ok && p.cssHrefs && p.cssHrefs.length) firstCss = p.cssHrefs;\n      if (!firstInline && p && p.ok && p.styleTexts && p.styleTexts.length) firstInline = p.styleTexts;\n\n      pages.push({ entry: entries[i], page: p });\n\n      done++;\n      overlay.update(done, entries.length, p.ok ? `Captured ${done}/${entries.length}` : `Failed ${done}/${entries.length}`);\n    }\n\n    if (overlay.isCanceled()) { overlay.set('Canceled.'); setTimeout(overlay.close, 250); return; }\n\n    const good = pages.filter(x => x.page && x.page.ok && x.page.html && x.page.html.trim().length);\n    if (!good.length) { overlay.close(); alert('No content could be captured. Check console logs for CAPTURE failed / PAGE result htmlLen=0.'); return; }\n\n    // Build combined body: skip failed pages entirely to avoid tons of blank pages\n    const bodies = pages\n      .filter(x => x.page && x.page.ok && x.page.html && x.page.html.trim().length)\n      .map((x, idx, arr) => {\n        const isLast = idx === arr.length - 1;\n        const title = x.page.title || leftPipe(x.entry.expectedTitle) || 'Untitled';\n        return `\u003csection class=\"btPrintPage\">\n          \u003ch1 class=\"btPageTitle\">${esc(title)}\u003c/h1>\n          ${x.page.html}\n          ${!isLast ? `\u003cdiv class=\"page-break\">\u003c/div>` : ``}\n        \u003c/section>`;\n      }).join('');\n\n    const project = getProjectName() || 'BeyondTrust';\n\n    const html = buildPrintDoc({\n      title: project,\n      bodyHTML: bodies,\n      pageCssHrefs: (firstCss && firstCss.length) ? firstCss : collectCssLinks(document),\n      inlineStyles: (firstInline && firstInline.length) ? firstInline : collectInlineStyles(document),\n      headerTitle: project,\n      headerSubtitle: `${good.length} page(s)`\n    });\n\n    let printed = false;\n    const doPrint = () => {\n      if (printed) return;\n      printed = true;\n      overlay.set('Opening print dialog…');\n      // Close the modal immediately so it doesn't sit on top of the print dialog\n      try { overlay.close(); } catch {}\n      printHtmlInHiddenIframe(html, () => {\n        try { overlay.close(); } catch {}\n      });\n    };\n\n    overlay.enablePrint(doPrint);\n\n    // Auto-print attempt\n    setTimeout(doPrint, 60);\n  }\n\n  // Buttons\n  const ensureButtons = () => {\n    const isDocs = /\\/docs\\//.test(location.pathname) || !!getSidebar() || !!document.querySelector('#content-container');\n    const isChangelog = /\\/changelog\\//.test(location.pathname) || !!document.querySelector('.rm-Changelog, article.rm-Changelog-post, .rm-Changelog-post, .rm-ChangelogPost');\n    const hasPrintable = isDocs || isChangelog || !!getContainer();\n    if (!hasPrintable) return;\n\n    if (!document.getElementById(PAGE_BTN_ID)) {\n      const b = document.createElement('button');\n      b.id = PAGE_BTN_ID; b.type = 'button';\n      b.innerHTML = `\u003cimg src=\"https://files.readme.io/90356a160e1e257f3168f93755ba0138781e49367f765485a2f0c923bf5ebcff-print-white.svg\" style=\"width:20px;height:20px;vertical-align:middle;margin-right:6px\" alt=\"Print\">\u003cspan>Print Page\u003c/span>`;\n      b.onclick = onPrintPage;\n      document.body.appendChild(b);\n    }\n\n    const pageBtn = document.getElementById(PAGE_BTN_ID);\n\n    // Print Section(s) only on top-level docs pages (needs sidebar). Never in iframes.\n    const allowSections = (!BT_IN_IFRAME) && (isDocs) && !!getSidebar();\n    let catBtn = document.getElementById(CAT_BTN_ID);\n    if (!allowSections) {\n      if (catBtn) { try { catBtn.remove(); } catch {} }\n      catBtn = null;\n    }\n    if (allowSections && !catBtn) {\n      catBtn = document.createElement('button');\n      catBtn.id = CAT_BTN_ID; catBtn.type = 'button';\n      catBtn.innerHTML = `\u003ci class=\"fas fa-file-pdf\" style=\"font-size:18px;margin-right:6px;color:#fff;\">\u003c/i>\u003cspan>Print Section(s)\u003c/span>`;\n      catBtn.onclick = onPrintSection;\n      document.body.appendChild(catBtn);\n    }\n\n    const positionStack = () => {\n      if (!pageBtn || !catBtn) return;\n      const r = pageBtn.getBoundingClientRect();\n      const bottom = Math.max(12 + 28, (window.innerHeight - r.top) + 10);\n      catBtn.style.bottom = `${bottom}px`;\n    };\n    positionStack();\n    window.addEventListener('scroll', positionStack, { passive:true });\n    window.addEventListener('resize', positionStack, { passive:true });\n  };\n\n  const boot = () => ensureButtons();\n  if (document.readyState === 'loading') document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', boot);\n  else boot();\n  new MutationObserver(() => { boot(); }).observe(document.body, { childList:true, subtree:true });\n\n  window.__BeyondTrustPrint = { printPage: onPrintPage, printSection: onPrintSection };\n})();\n\u003c/script>","html_hidelinks":false,"showVersion":true,"hideTableOfContents":false,"nextStepsLabel":"","promos":[],"ai_dropdown":"disabled","ai_options":{"chatgpt":"enabled","claude":"enabled","clipboard":"enabled","view_as_markdown":"enabled","copilot":"enabled","perplexity":"enabled","ask_ai":"disabled"},"showPageIcons":true,"layout":{"full_width":false,"style":"classic"},"methodBadgeStyle":"classic","showMethodInSidebar":true,"showBreadcrumbs":false,"collapsibleCategories":false},"custom_domain":"docs.beyondtrust.com","childrenProjects":[{"_id":"66ed848464db600019c01432","accessRules":{"branch_merge":{"admin":true,"editor":false},"branch_approve":{"admin":true,"editor":false}},"ai":{"chat":{"knowledge":{"custom_knowledge":null,"use_project_knowledge":false},"models":[]}},"appearance":{"changelog":{"layoutExpanded":false,"showAuthor":false,"showExactDate":true},"rdmd":{"callouts":{"useIconFont":false},"theme":{"background":"","border":"","markdownEdge":"","markdownFont":"","markdownFontSize":"","markdownLineHeight":"","markdownRadius":"","markdownText":"","markdownTitle":"","markdownTitleFont":"","mdCodeBackground":"","mdCodeFont":"","mdCodeRadius":"","mdCodeTabs":"","mdCodeText":"","tableEdges":"","tableHead":"","tableHeadText":"","tableRow":"","tableStripe":"","tableText":"","text":"","title":""}},"main_body":{"type":"links"},"colors":{"highlight":"","main":"#ff5500","main_alt":"","header_text":"","body_highlight":"","custom_login_link_color":"","body_highlight_dark":""},"typography":{"headline":"Open+Sans:400:sans-serif","body":"Open+Sans:400:sans-serif","typekit":false,"tk_key":"","tk_headline":"","tk_body":""},"header":{"style":"solid","img":[],"img_size":"auto","img_pos":"tl","linkStyle":"buttons"},"body":{"style":"none"},"global_landing_page":{"html":"","redirect":""},"allowApiExplorerJsonEditor":false,"referenceSimpleMode":true,"referenceLayout":"row","link_logo_to_url":false,"theme":"line","colorScheme":"system","overlay":"triangles","landin Smart Groups and manage Password Safe managed accounts.","_id":"698cbae1a5aa04b8d408455b"},{"term":"Managed Accounts","definition":"A managed account is an account on the managed system whose password is being stored and maintained through Password Safe. Typically, managed accounts are privileged accounts that can perform administrative tasks on the managed system.","_id":"698cbae1a5aa04b8d408455c"},{"term":"Managed System","definition":"A managed system is a computer or device where one or more account passwords are to be maintained by Password Safe.","_id":"698cbae1a5aa04b8d408455d"},{"term":"Functional account","definition":"A functional account is one that can access the system with the privileges required to manage and change passwords for shared accounts on the system.","_id":"698cbae1a5aa04b8d408455e"},{"term":"Web Portal","definition":"Web Portal is a feature of the Password Safe web application that is used by **end users** that is, Requestors, Approvers for requesting access to credentials and sessions and approving/denying access requests.","_id":"698cbae1a5aa04b8d408455f"},{"term":"Web Console","definition":"Web Console is used for **administrators **and used for the configuration and management of Password Safe settings and performing administrative tasks.","_id":"698cbae1a5aa04b8d4084560"},{"term":"Managed Asset","definition":"Subset of Known Assets that have been Onboarded and added to Password Safe. This may be referred to as an Asset that is \"Under Management\" and is also referred to as a \"Managed System\".","_id":"698cbae1a5aa04b8d4084561"},{"term":"Known Asset","definition":"Any System, Database, Application, or Network Device added to BeyondInsight.","_id":"698cbae1a5aa04b8d4084562"},{"term":"Asset","definition":"Any IP addressable device within an organization’s IT environment.","_id":"698cbae1a5aa04b8d4084563"},{"term":"parliament","definition":"Owls are generally solitary, but when seen together the group is called a 'parliament'!","_id":"698cbae1a5aa04b8d4084564"}],"graphqlSchema":"","gracePeriod":{"enabled":false,"endsAt":null},"shouldGateDash":false,"healthCheck":{"provider":"","settings":{}},"i18n":{"defaultLanguage":"en","languages":["en"],"state":"enabled"},"intercom_secure_emailonly":false,"intercom":"","is_active":true,"integrations":{"login":{}},"internal":"","jwtExpirationTime":0,"landing_bottom":[],"mdxMigrationStatus":"rdmd","metrics":{"monthlyLimit":0,"monthlyPurchaseLimit":0,"thumbsEnabled":false,"meteredBilling":{}},"modules":{"landing":false,"docs":true,"examples":true,"reference":true,"graphql":false,"changelog":true,"discuss":false,"suggested_edits":false,"custompages":false,"tutorials":false},"name":"Password #9da4ae;\n  --gray-500: #6c737f;\n  --gray-600: #475467;\n  --gray-700: #384250;\n  --gray-800: #1f2a37;\n  --gray-900: #111927;\n  --gray-950: #0c111d;\n  \n  --blue-100: #1c63a5; /*text active, focus, selected item*/\n  --blue-200: #1771c6; /*text hover*/\n  --black-400: #949494; /*dark: border*/\n  --black-500: #6b6b6b;\n\n  --sky-blue-100: #53b1fd; /*dark: text active, focus, selected item*/\n  --sky-blue-200: #7cc3fd; /*dark: text hover*/\n\n  --navy-50: #e9ebec;\n  --navy-100: #c8cdd1;\n\n  --color-bg-page: #ffffff; /*light: background*/\n  --brand-orange: #ff5500;\n}\n\n@media (prefers-color-scheme: light) {\n    body {\n        --color-bg-page: #ffffff; /*light: background*/\n    }\n}\n[data-color-mode=\"light\"] body {\n    --color-bg-page: #ffffff; /*dark: (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {\n  [data-color-mode=\"system\"] blockquote.callout.callout_warn[theme=\"⚠️\"] .heading,\n  [data-color-mode=\"system\"] blockquote.callout.callout_warning[theme=\"⚠️\"] transform: translateY(-20px);\n}\n\n/* === Fix spacing below images === */\n\nspan.img + p,\nspan.img + blockquote,\nspan.img + div,\nspan.img + ul,\nspan.img + ol {\n    margin-top: 20px;\n}\n\n\n/*
